sequence: 在一处不可思议的世外桃源中，矗立着一座不可思议的宏伟城堡。
这座不可思议的宏伟城堡由一位不可思议的城主指挥官所统领，守护着一个不可思议的宝物。
宝物如同黑夜中的灯塔，吸引着世间一切贪婪与渴望的目光，所有人都想得到它。
但是，宝物一直被不可思议的守护魔法保护着，除了城主指挥官外，所有人都无法接近它。
于是，所有觊觎宝物的邪恶力量决定联合起来。
她们发动了邪恶的仪式，引发了一场不可思议的大地震，摧毁了繁华的城池。
宏伟的城堡与守护法阵一同在地震中分崩离析。
守护魔法失效后，众多觊觎宝物之人即将纷至沓来。
宝物所在之处即将化为战场——
——还好，一切尚有时间。

序.say: 城主指挥官大人，事态紧急，请容许我们立即向您汇报城内情况！
这场史无前例的大地震破坏了守护结界，外面那些窥伺宝物的坏忍者已经潜入城内，伺机而动！
而、而且！先前被结界镇压在各地的妖鬼，全部跑出来了……
此外，城内四大区域——三之丸、二之丸、东曲轮和本丸——均受损严重，多处建筑和防御工事急需修复。
城内与外界联系的渠道也中断了，我们似乎陷入孤立无援的境地了！
嗯……情况我大概理解了。
但是这个剧本不是叫忍者之城么，为什么变成了被忍者攻打之城？
咳咳！不用在意这些细节！
总、总之，请您先下达指令吧，我们接下来首要的任务应该是——
没错！修复城池，保护宝物！
没错！修复城池，保护宝物！
不……不对啦！应该是修复城池，保护宝物才对！
我建议接下来从三之丸开始维修哦！
……为什么不先修最内层的本丸？
因为剧本会乱掉……
……好，那花月，接下来的维修工作就交给你来分配了。
是，城主指挥官！
凉月，你负责修复各地受损的城防工程和建筑设施，确保城市能够正常运作，并预防敌方进一步入侵。
明白！凉月和噗太定当全力以赴的！
春月，你的职责是尽快重构结界，重新约束那些挣脱了封印的妖鬼。
春、春月明白了！
然后……岛风，时机成熟的时候，就拜托你去向盟友们发去支援信件了！
我已经准备好全速前进啦~
城主指挥官，工作分配完毕。我也会持续收集信息，定期整理情报向您汇报维修进度的！
很好，那就让这次的剧目开始吧。

三之丸修复报告.say: 城主指挥官大人，三之丸已经修复完成，接下来就由我来向您汇报情况吧~
在凉月的统筹下，受损的长屋、米仓和贮水池已全面修复完毕。
粮食供应和饮水问题都得到了大幅缓解，大家终于可以在安全的地方睡个好觉了。
春月也找到了重构结界的方法，或许不久后就会有所突破。
她布下的阵法也成功安抚了三之丸区域内的妖鬼，目前人心已趋向安定。
再加上接受招募而来的浪人武士——厌战阁下的助阵。
在她的牵头下，我们已经在城内各处关键位置设置了辻番所，作为治安警备机构，重振城内秩序。
接下来，我们可以将人手集中在下一个待修复区域了。
接下来要修复的是二之丸区域？
嗯！二之丸区域也很靠近震源地，受灾面积不小。
再加上那些受损建筑中存放着各类公务文书，很有可能被敌方忍者盯上。
那就立即着手二之丸的修复工作吧。

二之丸修复报告.say: 继三之丸之后，二之丸也顺利修复完成了……花月虽然经验不足，但应该也帮上忙了呢~
具体情况如何，就由我来向您汇报吧！
首先是守护结界的重构进展——春月已经确认了重构结界的方案，只需等待物资采购到位就可以开始。
这样的话，对妖鬼的安抚工作势必无法并行……我们需要一位强力支援呢。
不过，还有一个振奋人心的好消息！
那位名动四方的艺伎——布伦努斯小姐已经响应了您的号召，来到我们身边。
她的到来让全城士气大涨，首演就座无虚席。
然后是凉月负责的建筑修复方面——小天守、修行地和三御门外断桥的修复工作均已完工。
此外，您亲自俘获的那些忍者也为我们送上了不少情报。
她们所隶属的那个恶名远扬的盗宝组织——“忍者五人众”……这可能给我们后续的修复工作带来许多麻烦。
为避免夜长梦多，突生变故，我们可以优先修复东曲轮的兵营区域，加强城内的常备武装力量。
这样，就可以在应对突发状况的时候抢先出击，掌握主动权。
下一步的修复重心就放在东曲轮，全力筹备相关事宜吧。

东曲轮修复报告.say: 城主指挥官大人，请让花月向您介绍东曲轮的修复进展吧。
东曲轮虽然占地面积较小，但修复起来可不比前两个区域简单呢。
单说兵营和武器库里那些受损的兵器，就让凉月伤了不少脑筋……
但请您放心！经过重新的淬炼、打磨之后，它们已经恢复往日的锋芒，变得闪闪发亮了哦。
春月负责的部分也有进展。结界所需的物资已尽数齐备，接下来，她就可以全力重构守护结界了。
原本还担心剩下的人手不够镇压各地的妖鬼，好在情况迎来了转机——
在您的号召下，兔兔城主拉菲带着她手下的兔兔军团正好填补了这方面的空缺。
与此同时，公家的加斯科涅小姐也送来了丰厚的修复物资，极大缓和了后勤压力。
接下来，请城主指挥官大人下达最后的指令吧！
万事俱备，可以一鼓作气完成本丸的修复工作了。
但对于敌方忍者来说，这也是最后的翻盘机会。不要掉以轻心。
请您放心，春月会安排好所有细节的！
我们已经做好了完全的准备，团结一心地聚集在您的麾下。
既然如此，就可以集中全部力量去修复本丸区域了。
即便敌方忍者还在做最后的挣扎，也不会是我们的对手。
请您放心，花月这就去安排~

圆满落幕.say: 城主指挥官大人，本丸的修复工作终于圆满完成！
为避免后续再出现类似的问题，凉月还在修复过程中针对各处设施进行了全方位升级！
比如说，在面对四季交替的考验时，我们就充分考虑了夏日避暑和冬日保暖的问题。
甚至还准备了多重预案，确保四季都能舒适宜人！
当然，天守阁和周围要害部位的防御工事也有了极大的提升。
就算再度遭遇袭击，我们也能从容应对了。
不过，在修复过程中，我们也遇到了一些意外的插曲……
那就是那伙狡猾的“忍者五人众”！她们一直潜伏在暗处，试图盗取我们的宝物呢。
幸好城主大人早有防备，成功挫败了她们的图谋，也保障了城池的安全。
现在城内局势愈发稳定，外部闯入的敌人已向您宣誓效忠，暗地里捣乱的妖鬼也全数归顺。
最后就是春月带给您的好消息——守护结界已经重构完成。
不过，结界只认可宝物的主人——也就是您的命令。这最后一步，还需要您亲自完成。
就请您登上天守阁，让全城再度笼罩在您的威严之下吧！
于是，城主指挥官登上了天守阁。
光柱冲天而起，骤然绽开化作半透明的穹顶。
不可思议的守护法阵恢复了运转，不可思议的宏伟城堡重新巍然矗立。
一切动荡、阴谋与黑暗都失败了，不可思议的世外桃源重新恢复了和平。

sequence: ——「激战！忍者之城！」·完

绽放于至深之夜.say: 长屋修好后不久，就传出了闹鬼的传闻。
“入夜之后，会亲切招呼迷路的旅人，将其拖入黑影的长角之鬼”么……
这传言到底有几分可信度，还得亲自验证过才知道真假。
原来城主大人是为这件事而来的啊~
浅间斜倚在矮几旁，身上松松垮垮地拢着黑纱裘衣。
她修长的指甲尖轻轻挑动身侧的灯芯，神色藏在变幻莫测的光影之间。
不过呢，即便是为了查明传闻的真相……
像这样深夜孤身闯入危险区域，也很难说是理性之举。
她掩唇微笑着贴近了些许，压低的嗓音带着难以捉摸的蛊惑。
万一那传闻中的长角之鬼，此刻就贴在您身后……岂不是危险万分？
幸好城主大人遇到的，是我这个好心的屋主呢。呵呵~
……怎么了，您似乎有些坐立不安？
哎呀，也是，也是。是我忘了给尊贵的客人奉上一杯茶，真是失礼。
城主大人，那就饮一杯刚热好的茶汤暖暖身子吧？
让迷路的旅人寻得一份安逸，亦是主人的本分呢。
茶汤香气馥郁，带着一丝奇妙的甘甜。
在浅间姿态柔顺的服侍下，我饮下茶汤，片刻后就感到困意袭来。
呵呵……城主大人这就要，坠入梦乡了吗？
您事务繁重，是该在浅间身边好好安眠了呢。
就让这至深之夜，成为您永恒的安寝之所——
浅间轻轻拨开黑纱裘衣，如同要向我揭示迷雾深处的真实，一身苍白肌肤透出非人的苍白光泽。
她的影子也在摇曳的光影中开始扭曲、拉长，生出了妖异的鬼角——
——又在下一秒瞬间溃散。
……什么？我的力量……消失了？
不愧是不可思议的城主指挥官……看来是有备而来呢。
如此彻底的压制，浅间还是第一次感受到……
浅间缓缓伏低身形，用微凉的脸颊轻轻蹭着我的手背。
既然如此……
浅间，对您心悦诚服，自愿奉您为主。
请恣意驱策我的力量吧。
我将化作您最忠诚的影，为您的敌人带去终结……直到……
直到您对我卸下所有心防，不自觉流露出毫不设防的那一面……
等到那时……呵呵……
她的声音轻如耳语，似乎是为了掩饰难忍的饥饿感。
再让我专注地、仔细地……品尝您的滋味吧~

饭团奇遇.say: 经过紧急抢修，米仓终于补上了最后一个窟窿，城内的食物供给有了保障。
正当我准备封闭仓库时，隐约听见了一阵窸窸窣窣的声响……
唔……肚子立刻咕咕叫起来了……
饭团奇遇.actorName: 妙风 [忍者的紧急迫降修行！]

饭团奇遇.say: 一路伪装潜伏到这里，都没有顾得上吃东西……
饭团奇遇.actorName: 妙风 [忍者的紧急迫降修行！]

饭团奇遇.say: 不过，饿肚子的时间结束了！这些吃的马上就都归我啦！
饭团奇遇.actorName: 妙风 [忍者的紧急迫降修行！]

饭团奇遇.say: 树影摇晃，忍者从中探出头来，小心翼翼地四下张望着。
饭团奇遇.actorName: 妙风 [忍者的紧急迫降修行！]

饭团奇遇.say: 咦？路边好像有几颗……野生的饭团！
饭团奇遇.actorName: 妙风 [忍者的紧急迫降修行！]

饭团奇遇.say: 不愧是囤着全城食物的地方，在地上都能捡到好吃的……妙风就不客气啦！
饭团奇遇.actorName: 妙风 [忍者的紧急迫降修行！]

饭团奇遇.say: 欸？为什么饭团上有根绳子……？哇——！
饭团奇遇.actorName: 妙风 [忍者的紧急迫降修行！]

饭团奇遇.say: 抓到行迹可疑的忍者了……饭团陷阱果然有效。
饭团奇遇.actorName: {playername}

饭团奇遇.say: 说吧，来做什么的？
饭团奇遇.actorName: {playername}

饭团奇遇.say: 糟了！是陷阱——！
饭团奇遇.actorName: 妙风 [忍者的紧急迫降修行！]

饭团奇遇.say: 唔……你就放弃吧！身为训练有素的忍者，妙风是不会屈服于暴力手段的！
饭团奇遇.actorName: 妙风 [忍者的紧急迫降修行！]

饭团奇遇.say: 除非……（偷瞄饭团）
饭团奇遇.actorName: 妙风 [忍者的紧急迫降修行！]

饭团奇遇.say: 只要你如实交代，饭团要多少有多少。
饭团奇遇.actorName: {playername}

饭团奇遇.say: 城主指挥官大人…………我招！我全招！
饭团奇遇.actorName: 妙风 [忍者的紧急迫降修行！]

饭团奇遇.say: 我叫妙风，只是一个被安排到最苦最累最危险侦察任务的小喽啰……绝对不是什么大凶大恶之人哦！
饭团奇遇.actorName: 妙风 [忍者的紧急迫降修行！]

饭团奇遇.say: 比我先一步出发的最强“忍者五人众”，应该已经早就潜入更深的区域了！
饭团奇遇.actorName: 妙风 [忍者的紧急迫降修行！]

饭团奇遇.say: 城主指挥官大人，你一定要小心她们哦！
饭团奇遇.actorName: 妙风 [忍者的紧急迫降修行！]

饭团奇遇.say: “忍者五人众”……？
饭团奇遇.actorName: {playername}

饭团奇遇.say: 那也就是说至少有五个人，也有可能是六个人或者七个人已经潜入城内了啊……
饭团奇遇.actorName: {playername}

饭团奇遇.say: 看来得抓紧修复进度了。
饭团奇遇.actorName: {playername}

饭团奇遇.say: 我知道的，都已经告诉你啦！
饭团奇遇.actorName: 妙风 [忍者的紧急迫降修行！]

饭团奇遇.say: 如果、如果再不能吃到饭团的话……妙风就要饿晕过去了……！
饭团奇遇.actorName: 妙风 [忍者的紧急迫降修行！]

饭团奇遇.say: 欸？这些都给我吗——啊呜！
饭团奇遇.actorName: 妙风 [忍者的紧急迫降修行！]

饭团奇遇.say: 饭团真香啊……！以后妙风就跟着慷慨大方英明神武的城主指挥官大人你混啦！
饭团奇遇.actorName: 妙风 [忍者的紧急迫降修行！]

饭团奇遇.say: 别误会了，妙风可不是吃白食的……！
饭团奇遇.actorName: 妙风 [忍者的紧急迫降修行！]

饭团奇遇.say: 从现在开始，不管是什么样的要求……
饭团奇遇.actorName: 妙风 [忍者的紧急迫降修行！]

饭团奇遇.say: 来无影、去无踪的变化忍者妙风，都会立刻满足你的哟~
饭团奇遇.actorName: 妙风 [忍者的紧急迫降修行！]

池畔的诱捕.say: 清澈的水流注入干涸数日的贮水池，城内的供水问题暂时不需要担心了。
但听说贮水池的供水会在特定的时段极不稳定，为了查明原因，我来到池边调查。
就在我抵达的同时，池边传来了微弱的呼救声……
救命啊~有人在吗~
一位双手被缚的少女以奇怪的姿势跪伏于池畔，她的身形摇摇欲坠，似乎随时可能跌入水中。
唔，听说那位大人很容易被这幅场面吸引来……虽然感觉很奇怪，但还是试试吧……
……好像真的过来了？
咳咳，有人在吗——
贮水池里的坏妖怪把我困住了，请帮帮我吧——
呜呜，我可不会游泳啊~怎么办才好……
这位大人，您为何只是在一旁看着呢……
您这样的好心人，一定不会见死不救吧~
还是说……我这副狼狈的模样，让您感到兴奋了么？
那么，只要您救了我……
少女微微仰起头，柔嫩的唇瓣上沾着几缕湿漉漉的长发，显得格外惹人怜爱。
大人，快再靠近些吧~否则，我真的会遭遇危险哦？
说实话，你的演技值得夸赞。
但是我能看得出来，你腕上的绳子是自己绑上去的吧？
欸？！怎、怎么会……你是怎么看出来的？
城主指挥官，也是带有指挥官字段的……怎么会看不出绳结是怎么打的呢。
眼见谎言被拆穿，少女慢慢地停下了手上的动作，露出了藏不住的狡黠笑容。
呵呵，看来瞒不过您呢……
本来想等您再靠近些，再发动偷袭的……
既然这样，那我就只好用些强制手段了呢~
近江向前卧行了几步，腕上的绳索突然散开。
她毫不犹豫地向我扑来，却又突然地停顿，仿佛被无形的力量定住了。
什么？！怎么使不上力……你对我做了什么！
……我说我什么都没对你做，你信么？
不……我明白了，不愧是不可思议的城主指挥官，这股不可思议的守护之力将我彻底压制了……
呼……这下真的动弹不得了呢……
这就是所谓的“种瓜得瓜”吧……
所以，你就是导致贮水池供水异常的妖怪吧？
怎么能这么说呢~我只是一只住在这里的小妖怪而已。
妖怪也是要喝水的呀，为了不惊扰路人，我每天只选择特定时段出来活动呢……
我发誓，再也不袭击人类了……大人您就放了我吧~
大人，为什么不说话了呢？我要把您的沉默，当作同意的意思了哦？
呵呵，既然如此，我可得好好报答您才行~
虽然现在还不能自由行动，不过……
大人，请再靠近一些……安心接受我的“报恩”吧~

西瓜浪人.say: 疾驰的岛风带来了远方的传信，据说回应邀请的是一位武艺高强的浪人。
根据回信中留下的地址，我来到一处偏僻的竹林。
走得越深，四周的断竹就越多，不难看出，这还是位勤于训练的盟友。
呼，很好，今天的修炼顺利进行到一半了……什么人！
……啊！失礼了，你就是我应当效忠之人吗？
我已经在这里等你好久了。
手持竹刀的少女刚刚结束一轮挥砍，汗水顺着她的额间滑落。
注意到我的到来后，她朝我微微颔首执意。
我看到了你正在召集人手守卫城堡的书信。
我是浪人武士厌战，于今日应召而来。
嗯？你那眼神是怎么回事，怎么有点……困惑……？
这片竹林里的断竹……都是你的手笔么？
当然咯，武艺不可一日荒废嘛。
用的竹刀？
这种事对我来说轻而易举~
作为想要寻求名主的浪人武士，不把武艺精进到这种程度可不行啊。
正好趁现在，让你见识下……我惩戒宵小之徒的手段吧！
话音刚落，不知从何处飞来的西瓜，在我眼前顷刻间变为整齐地两半。
尝一口吧，很甜的哦。
很甜，好瓜。
那我的实力呢，如何？有没有让你满意？
身手不凡，我很满意，你被雇佣了。
城内独立住所，免费一日三餐，提供盔甲武器，除此之外你还可以随意使用各处训练场地。
作为交换，我需要你协助我维护城内的治安秩序。
成交。城主指挥官大人，我一定不会让你失望的！

方寸桃红.say: 小天守阁内，桐油清香尚未散尽，更有桃花为其增色。
我推开虚掩的纸门，目光投向文书室内存放着密函的漆柜——以及那位意料之中的访客。
这可真是……最糟糕的偶遇呢~
本来只是想趁着幽月空悬，向您借阅几份解闷的“闲书”……
却不想扰了城主大人的清梦，真是罪过~
文书重地，不请自来，该当何罪？
请体谅云仙自远方初至，下次，自当注意。
云仙摩挲着系在腰后的苦无，姿态闲散如赏花，又隐隐透露出一丝警觉。
但看来，如今就算成功借到了书……
恐怕也逃不出这方寸之地了呢。
写满了机要的密卷被纤指轻推入屉。云仙的动作毫无攻击性，仿佛只是拂去片缕尘埃。
与此同时，她的视线窥向我身后。
狭小的室内有只一处出口，此刻已经完全处在我的掌控之中。
城主大人，何必闹得如此剑拔弩张呢？
您看，这地方……窄得连转身都显得局促呢。
我呢，最不喜欢在这种束手束脚的地方，做些无谓的胜负之争了~
让我们坐下来好好谈谈吧，还是说……
我敏锐的城主大人，更想提前收取您此番的奖励呢？
她主动向我递来纤细的手腕，露出月光般白皙柔美的肌肤。
而后，不等我做出反应，她便足尖倏地点地，起身上前的同时亮出了藏在袖中的绳索。
云仙捉住您了哦~哎呀……！
疼疼疼，撞到墙面了……
还是高估了这间屋子的宽度呢……
欸，胜负已分……城主大人，您抓人的手可真是精妙呢。
……我，做了什么吗？
我是“忍者五人众”之一，云仙，如今便是您的俘虏了。
又是“忍者五人众”……其他人在什么地方？
谁知道呢……关注其他人的行动也太无趣了。
如此良辰，你我之间，不应该做一些更应景的事么？
榻榻米上，云仙的身形明显放松下来，铺散的银发与零落桃瓣缱绻交缠。
那根险些缚住我的绳索，也不自觉换了束缚的对象，松松垮垮地缠绕在她腕间。
唔……方才还觉得这间屋子小，现在却觉得小得正好。
倒是这绳子，落在谁身上，都能成就一桩趣事~
好了，别那么警惕，来陪陪我吧，城主大人~
就让云仙伴您度过……剩下的夜晚~

小狐妖的冥想修行.say: 午后的阳光温柔地照耀着修行地，漫天的樱花缓缓随风飘落。
而后，我注意到了远处屋顶上那一抹不寻常的身影。
小狐妖的冥想修行.actorName: 水无濑 [巫女的冥想修行]

小狐妖的冥想修行.say: 嗅嗅~是陌生的气味……有客人来了呢~
小狐妖的冥想修行.actorName: 水无濑 [巫女的冥想修行]

小狐妖的冥想修行.say: 屋顶之上，一位平躺的少女随意摇动着毛茸茸的尾巴。
小狐妖的冥想修行.actorName: 水无濑 [巫女的冥想修行]

小狐妖的冥想修行.say: 即便看不到她身旁漂浮着的几点鬼火，也不难猜出她的身份。
小狐妖的冥想修行.actorName: 水无濑 [巫女的冥想修行]

小狐妖的冥想修行.say: 哈欠……这里很好睡觉呢……
小狐妖的冥想修行.actorName: 水无濑 [巫女的冥想修行]

小狐妖的冥想修行.say: 唔！忘了正事~你也是来这里修行的吗？
小狐妖的冥想修行.actorName: 水无濑 [巫女的冥想修行]

小狐妖的冥想修行.say: 你这是在……修行？
小狐妖的冥想修行.actorName: {playername}

小狐妖的冥想修行.say: 没错~在灵气浓郁的地方晒太阳，可是最高效的修行方式哦~
小狐妖的冥想修行.actorName: 水无濑 [巫女的冥想修行]

小狐妖的冥想修行.say: 狐妖少女满足地伸了个懒腰，看起来完全就是在享受午后的休憩。
小狐妖的冥想修行.actorName: 水无濑 [巫女的冥想修行]

小狐妖的冥想修行.say: 现在这里可是我的专属地盘啦~毕竟我好不容易才找到这个修行宝地呢！
小狐妖的冥想修行.actorName: 水无濑 [巫女的冥想修行]

小狐妖的冥想修行.say: 不过，我也不是什么不讲道理的坏妖怪……
小狐妖的冥想修行.actorName: 水无濑 [巫女的冥想修行]

小狐妖的冥想修行.say: 如果你实在想要在这里修行的话……也不是不可以~
小狐妖的冥想修行.actorName: 水无濑 [巫女的冥想修行]

小狐妖的冥想修行.say: 我身边，正好还有个空位哦~
小狐妖的冥想修行.actorName: 水无濑 [巫女的冥想修行]

小狐妖的冥想修行.say: 少女慵懒地摇了摇尾巴，拂开身旁飘落的花瓣，为我开辟出一小块地方。
小狐妖的冥想修行.actorName: 水无濑 [巫女的冥想修行]

小狐妖的冥想修行.say: 晒太阳修行么……倒是新奇。
小狐妖的冥想修行.actorName: {playername}

小狐妖的冥想修行.say: 既然好奇，那还等什么呢~快来陪我一起呀？
小狐妖的冥想修行.actorName: 水无濑 [巫女的冥想修行]

小狐妖的冥想修行.say: 于是，我在狐妖少女身旁躺下，与她感受着温暖的阳光。
小狐妖的冥想修行.actorName: 水无濑 [巫女的冥想修行]

小狐妖的冥想修行.say: 静下心来冥想……深呼吸……
小狐妖的冥想修行.actorName: 水无濑 [巫女的冥想修行]

小狐妖的冥想修行.say: 感受到了吗？那随着暖意一同而来的灵气。
小狐妖的冥想修行.actorName: 水无濑 [巫女的冥想修行]

小狐妖的冥想修行.say: 相比灵气，我只感受到了一条悄悄在我身上游走的、毛茸茸的尾巴。
小狐妖的冥想修行.actorName: 水无濑 [巫女的冥想修行]

小狐妖的冥想修行.say: 呼呼……是不是有种正在逐渐被治愈，逐渐被灵力填满的感觉？
小狐妖的冥想修行.actorName: 水无濑 [巫女的冥想修行]

小狐妖的冥想修行.say: 这可是我独创的修行辅助秘法哦~
小狐妖的冥想修行.actorName: 水无濑 [巫女的冥想修行]

小狐妖的冥想修行.say: 好啦，现在该轮到你帮我了！
小狐妖的冥想修行.actorName: 水无濑 [巫女的冥想修行]

小狐妖的冥想修行.say: 狐妖少女的柔软的尾巴尖在我的手心中勾了勾，而后俏皮地眨了眨眼睛。
小狐妖的冥想修行.actorName: 水无濑 [巫女的冥想修行]

小狐妖的冥想修行.say: 也好，礼尚往来。
小狐妖的冥想修行.actorName: {playername}

小狐妖的冥想修行.say: 我顺着毛的流向，我轻轻梳理着这毛茸茸的大尾巴。
小狐妖的冥想修行.actorName: 水无濑 [巫女的冥想修行]
水无濑 [巫女的冥想修行]

小狐妖的冥想修行.say: 哈、哈……好舒服……
小狐妖的冥想修行.actorName: 水无濑 [巫女的冥想修行]

小狐妖的冥想修行.say: 感觉……全身的灵气都变得更充盈了呢……？
小狐妖的冥想修行.actorName: 水无濑 [巫女的冥想修行]

小狐妖的冥想修行.say: 修行的效果，从来没有这么好过呢……
小狐妖的冥想修行.actorName: 水无濑 [巫女的冥想修行]

小狐妖的冥想修行.say: 少女舒服地眯起眼睛，蜷着身子向我靠近，尾巴也不自觉缠了上来。
小狐妖的冥想修行.actorName: 水无濑 [巫女的冥想修行]

小狐妖的冥想修行.say: 呼……困了。
小狐妖的冥想修行.actorName: 水无濑 [巫女的冥想修行]

小狐妖的冥想修行.say: 休息也是修行必要的一环……我们一起睡吧！
小狐妖的冥想修行.actorName: 水无濑 [巫女的冥想修行]

小狐妖的冥想修行.say: 就这样，与狐妖少女度过了悠闲的午后——
小狐妖的冥想修行.actorName: 水无濑 [巫女的冥想修行]

忍术大失败.say: 三御门外的桥梁修复后，沟通本丸与外界的阻碍消失，重现了几分往日的繁忙景象。
我站在桥上眺望四周，城内各处修复工作都在如火如荼地进行着。
组织搬运维修物资的凉月，还有河面上奔跑的忍者……
……在河面上奔跑的忍者？
只要把这根桥墩破坏掉，就能重新摧毁大桥了吧……
加油，莫里森……你一定行……
土遁……不对，水遁……也不对，水龙卷——
住手！
哇——？！被、被发现了？！
事、事先声明！我绝对不是来破坏大桥的哦……
我是来……是来验收维修成果的。
嗯，是来给桥墩查、查漏补缺的。
你是来验收维修成果的……？那你是谁？
我来验收维修城内的维修成果，那自然是……是这座城的城主啊。
……那我是谁？
你……你是谁我怎么知道。
我、我还有事……先走了哦！
……你不知道我是谁，为什么要跑？
我……呜呜呜——没办法了，事已至此……只能使用最终奥义了。
变、变化术——！
一阵烟雾过后，什么都没发生。
怎么会这样，我、我精心准备的幻影呢……
那个妙风说，只要一展现出来就能立刻迷惑所有人目光的幻影呢……
忍术道具在关键时刻故障了么……
……束手就擒吧。
……我是“忍者五人众”的莫里森……
任务失败了……我投降……
对不起，我只会这种程度的忍术……希望你不要嫌弃……
……你是不是跳过了什么步骤，我还没有招降你吧？
但、但是，我真的很需要一份工作……
拜、拜托了……城主指挥官！
只要能留下我在城里工作……我什么都愿意做的！

月下夜想曲.say: 夜幕降临，一场演奏会即将步入尾声。
据岛风所说，新的支援者已经抵达城内……正是台上的乐者。

月下夜想曲.actorName: 布伦努斯 [演奏者的夜想曲]

月下夜想曲.say: 与月夜下相会，遵循命运的指引……
月下夜想曲.actorName: 布伦努斯 [演奏者的夜想曲]

月下夜想曲.say: 孤月清辉下，布伦努斯身着一袭淡紫色的和服，长发垂落在腰间，发间别着一枚精致的金簪。
月下夜想曲.actorName: 布伦努斯 [演奏者的夜想曲]

月下夜想曲.say: 她似乎注意到了我的到来，停下了收琴的动作后直白地看向我，以眼神发出邀请。
月下夜想曲.actorName: 布伦努斯 [演奏者的夜想曲]

月下夜想曲.say: 于是，散场后的舞台上，只留下我与她独处。
月下夜想曲.actorName: 布伦努斯 [演奏者的夜想曲]

月下夜想曲.say: 城主大人，我方才的演奏，你还满意吗？
月下夜想曲.actorName: 布伦努斯 [演奏者的夜想曲]

月下夜想曲.say: 绝妙的演出。
月下夜想曲.actorName: {playername}

月下夜想曲.say: 但感觉……你还没有使出全部技艺。
月下夜想曲.actorName: {playername}

月下夜想曲.say: 既然城主大人还有雅兴，请容许我再为你单独演奏一曲吧。
月下夜想曲.actorName: 布伦努斯 [演奏者的夜想曲]

月下夜想曲.say: ……这首曲子，才是我特意为你准备的呢。
月下夜想曲.actorName: 布伦努斯 [演奏者的夜想曲]

月下夜想曲.say: 布伦努斯纤长的手指轻轻撩动琴弦，浪漫而缠绵的曲调悠然响起。
月下夜想曲.actorName: 布伦努斯 [演奏者的夜想曲]

月下夜想曲.say: 在琴声的牵引下，我仿佛坠入由琴声编织出的朦胧意象。
月下夜想曲.actorName: 布伦努斯 [演奏者的夜想曲]

月下夜想曲.say: 舞台的光影逐渐远去，我与她置身于无边无际的湖水中央，圆月的倒影在水镜的涟漪中碎作点点银光。
月下夜想曲.actorName: 布伦努斯 [演奏者的夜想曲]

月下夜想曲.say: 城主大人，我是为追随你而来。
月下夜想曲.actorName: 布伦努斯 [演奏者的夜想曲]

月下夜想曲.say: 不知道你在这首曲子里，能否感受到……我对你的仰慕之情呢？
月下夜想曲.actorName: 布伦努斯 [演奏者的夜想曲]

月下夜想曲.say: 即便只有片刻温存，也让我与你共赴……
月下夜想曲.actorName: 布伦努斯 [演奏者的夜想曲]

月下夜想曲.say: 她依偎向我，发梢携着一缕熟悉的幽香。
月下夜想曲.actorName: 布伦努斯 [演奏者的夜想曲]

月下夜想曲.say: 耳畔的曲声仍在倾诉着扑朔迷离的情愫，我们的影子于月下重叠，直至完全融合为一……
月下夜想曲.actorName: 布伦努斯 [演奏者的夜想曲]

月下夜想曲.say: ……不要停下，城主大人……
月下夜想曲.actorName: 布伦努斯 [演奏者的夜想曲]

月下夜想曲.say: 月光下，您朦胧的侧影，举手投足间的言语……
月下夜想曲.actorName: 布伦努斯 [演奏者的夜想曲]

月下夜想曲.say: 自初见时便已深深烙印在我心中，令我难以忘怀。
月下夜想曲.actorName: 布伦努斯 [演奏者的夜想曲]

月下夜想曲.say: 今日一见，我的心才终于感到满足。
月下夜想曲.actorName: 布伦努斯 [演奏者的夜想曲]

月下夜想曲.say: 若是你愿意，我想要将此生的温柔，尽数奉于你一人……
月下夜想曲.actorName: 布伦努斯 [演奏者的夜想曲]

月下夜想曲.say: 最后的琴音落下，银月与湖泊随余韵缓缓消散。
月下夜想曲.actorName: 布伦努斯 [演奏者的夜想曲]

月下夜想曲.say: 舞台上悬挂的灯笼随风摇晃，我与她之间的空气却粘稠得仿佛能捕捉到彼此的心跳。
月下夜想曲.actorName: 布伦努斯 [演奏者的夜想曲]

月下夜想曲.say: 刚才的幻境到底是……？
月下夜想曲.actorName: {playername}

月下夜想曲.say: 这是属于你我的秘密，城主大人。
月下夜想曲.actorName: 布伦努斯 [演奏者的夜想曲]

月下夜想曲.say: 但请放心，这份力量，以后只属于你。
月下夜想曲.actorName: 布伦努斯 [演奏者的夜想曲]

月下夜想曲.say: 不过，乐曲总有终章，感情却不相同。
月下夜想曲.actorName: 布伦努斯 [演奏者的夜想曲]

月下夜想曲.say: 如果城主大人也愿意回应我刚才的请求，就请将手递给我吧。
月下夜想曲.actorName: 布伦努斯 [演奏者的夜想曲]

月下夜想曲.say: 嗯……你的手，温暖得不可思议呢。
月下夜想曲.actorName: 布伦努斯 [演奏者的夜想曲]

月下夜想曲.say: 这一瞬于心中萌生的喜悦，如梦似幻，让人虚实难辨……
月下夜想曲.actorName: 布伦努斯 [演奏者的夜想曲]

月下夜想曲.say: 然而，相信命运终将眷顾之人，必会紧握此刻，予以回应吧。
月下夜想曲.actorName: 布伦努斯 [演奏者的夜想曲]

月下夜想曲.say: 这份悸动，这份祈盼，我已经等待了太久太久。
月下夜想曲.actorName: 布伦努斯 [演奏者的夜想曲]

月下夜想曲.say: 也请你与我一同，细细品味当下的这份确凿的幸福吧。
月下夜想曲.actorName: 布伦努斯 [演奏者的夜想曲]

圣宵之鬼的微醺.say: 兵营修复完成的消息传来，我携几壶好酒，踏着月色前去祝贺。
却在转眼间，踏入了一片异常浓稠的迷雾。
幽影之地的守护者、不可思议的圣迹、人类难以企及之幻梦、裁决者、鬼刃阿尔萨斯——
圣宵之鬼的微醺.actorName: 阿尔萨斯 [圣宵之鬼的微醺]

圣宵之鬼的微醺.say: 在此等候你很久了。
圣宵之鬼的微醺.actorName: 阿尔萨斯 [圣宵之鬼的微醺]

圣宵之鬼的微醺.say: 迷雾深处，鬼角覆面的少女悬卧于绳索之上。
圣宵之鬼的微醺.actorName: 阿尔萨斯 [圣宵之鬼的微醺]

圣宵之鬼的微醺.say: 这么多人？可是我就看到了你一个……其他人呢？
圣宵之鬼的微醺.actorName: {playername}

圣宵之鬼的微醺.say: 当然只有我一个人啊！怎么样，很帅吧，很厉害吧~
圣宵之鬼的微醺.actorName: 阿尔萨斯 [圣宵之鬼的微醺]

圣宵之鬼的微醺.say: 哼，在你们踏足此地之前的数百年前，此处乃是由我守护的幽影之地。
圣宵之鬼的微醺.actorName: 阿尔萨斯 [圣宵之鬼的微醺]

圣宵之鬼的微醺.say: 直到城池被你们的结界笼罩，圣洁的光芒遮蔽了我的耳目……才让我陷入长眠。
圣宵之鬼的微醺.actorName: 阿尔萨斯 [圣宵之鬼的微醺]

圣宵之鬼的微醺.say: 如今，结界崩坏，我也随之苏醒，自然要继续履行我的职责——
圣宵之鬼的微醺.actorName: 阿尔萨斯 [圣宵之鬼的微醺]

圣宵之鬼的微醺.say: 那便是审视当下执掌此地之人，是否有守护这片土地的觉悟。
圣宵之鬼的微醺.actorName: 阿尔萨斯 [圣宵之鬼的微醺]

圣宵之鬼的微醺.say: 如何，待裁决的城主啊，你做好准备了么？
圣宵之鬼的微醺.actorName: 阿尔萨斯 [圣宵之鬼的微醺]

圣宵之鬼的微醺.say: 想要裁决我之人，你又做好准备了么？
圣宵之鬼的微醺.actorName: {playername}

圣宵之鬼的微醺.say: ……我要做什么准备？
圣宵之鬼的微醺.actorName: 阿尔萨斯 [圣宵之鬼的微醺]

圣宵之鬼的微醺.say: 裁决的形式是什么？标准制定好了么？得出结论之后又要如何执行呢？
圣宵之鬼的微醺.actorName: {playername}

圣宵之鬼的微醺.say: ……欸？啊，这、这种细节……
圣宵之鬼的微醺.actorName: 阿尔萨斯 [圣宵之鬼的微醺]

圣宵之鬼的微醺.say: 幽影之地的守护者、不可思议的圣迹、人类难以企及之幻梦、裁决者、鬼刃阿尔萨斯阁下，你肯定已经把这些细节全部都想好了，对吧？
圣宵之鬼的微醺.actorName: {playername}

圣宵之鬼的微醺.say: ……阿尔萨斯，过载中……
圣宵之鬼的微醺.actorName: 阿尔萨斯 [圣宵之鬼的微醺]

圣宵之鬼的微醺.say: 有、有了！
圣宵之鬼的微醺.actorName: 阿尔萨斯 [圣宵之鬼的微醺]

圣宵之鬼的微醺.say: 当然是考量你的器量，你的决断力，还有你为了守护这片土地能做到什么程度——嗯？
圣宵之鬼的微醺.actorName: 阿尔萨斯 [圣宵之鬼的微醺]

圣宵之鬼的微醺.say: 你带的这坛酒，难道是……？
圣宵之鬼的微醺.actorName: 阿尔萨斯 [圣宵之鬼的微醺]

圣宵之鬼的微醺.say: ……这坛随便拿的酒，难道是？
圣宵之鬼的微醺.actorName: {playername}

圣宵之鬼的微醺.say: ……好香的酒……咕……难道是我在几百年前收藏的佳酿？
圣宵之鬼的微醺.actorName: 阿尔萨斯 [圣宵之鬼的微醺]

圣宵之鬼的微醺.say: ……那可真不得了。
圣宵之鬼的微醺.actorName: {playername}

圣宵之鬼的微醺.say: 是啊……真是不得了的美酒啊……
圣宵之鬼的微醺.actorName: 阿尔萨斯 [圣宵之鬼的微醺]

圣宵之鬼的微醺.say: 咕咚……咕咚……
圣宵之鬼的微醺.actorName: 阿尔萨斯 [圣宵之鬼的微醺]

圣宵之鬼的微醺.say: 阿尔萨斯不等我同意，便自顾自将美酒开封，喝了起来。
圣宵之鬼的微醺.actorName: 阿尔萨斯 [圣宵之鬼的微醺]

圣宵之鬼的微醺.say: 唔……醉、醉去之前，我要履行我的职责……宣布……裁决结果……
圣宵之鬼的微醺.actorName: 阿尔萨斯 [圣宵之鬼的微醺]

圣宵之鬼的微醺.say: 你将这座城池……管理得很好……
圣宵之鬼的微醺.actorName: 阿尔萨斯 [圣宵之鬼的微醺]

圣宵之鬼的微醺.say: 即使偶有松懈，未能保住结界……但是……
圣宵之鬼的微醺.actorName: 阿尔萨斯 [圣宵之鬼的微醺]

圣宵之鬼的微醺.say: 人……还不错~
圣宵之鬼的微醺.actorName: 阿尔萨斯 [圣宵之鬼的微醺]

圣宵之鬼的微醺.say: ……合格！阿尔萨斯，判定你……合格！
圣宵之鬼的微醺.actorName: 阿尔萨斯 [圣宵之鬼的微醺]

圣宵之鬼的微醺.say: 就、就这样吧……阿尔萨斯的体温正在急速上升……
圣宵之鬼的微醺.actorName: 阿尔萨斯 [圣宵之鬼的微醺]

圣宵之鬼的微醺.say: 呜……不行、不行了……
圣宵之鬼的微醺.actorName: 阿尔萨斯 [圣宵之鬼的微醺]

圣宵之鬼的微醺.say: 城主指挥官大人……请为我的身体，降降温……♡
圣宵之鬼的微醺.actorName: 阿尔萨斯 [圣宵之鬼的微醺]

绛縢华舞.say: 武器库修复完毕后，出于预防敌袭的目的，在重点区域布置了多处陷阱。
为防误触，我也在陷阱布置妥当之后，第一时间赶去确认了它们的位置。
就在我准备离开前，某个房间内突然传来绳索疾速抽动的“嗖嗖”声，以及一声活力满满的惊呼——
好心人！喂——说你呢，好心人！
来帮个忙，放我下来可以嘛！
屋内，被绳索陷阱所捕获的少女忍者，如同人形钟摆般左右摆动着。
哈哈，别露出这种怀疑的眼神嘛~
我可不是坏人哦！没有坏人会选择这种华丽的出场方式吧~！
即便被紧紧倒吊着，少女仍然活力四射。
不过说真的，你应该也觉得这里的陷阱太棒了吧~
我辛辛苦苦成为忍者，为了就是找到这样一处华丽的舞台啊~
啊哈哈，虽然没能顺利施展出所有才华就是了……
要是再给我一次机会的话，肯定能以灵活的舞步绕开这些陷阱呢！
嗯？你为什么只是看着我不说话？
相逢就是有缘，只要你愿意把我放下来，咱们也可以联手搞点更大——更华丽的动静哦！
……等等，你的长相，我好像在哪里看到过……是任务书……？
难、难道说……你就是这里的城主大人？！
欸——欸！那个，忘记404刚刚说了什么吧！全部忘掉吧，拜托拜托~
我只是个迷路的普通舞者，听说这里建了超级华丽的城池，才想着过来出出风头的~
至于其他不好的勾当，比如引来地震啊……破坏结界啊……试图搞破坏什么的啊……
我……可是一个都没做~！
你也是“忍者五人众”之一？
呜哇！一瞬间就被识破了？！
好吧好吧，既然如此就承认了！你所能见到的最华丽的忍者，伊404——向你发起投降，投降啦~！
接受你的投降之前，先说说你之前说的“搞点大事”是指什么？
唔，这个命题太宽泛了啦！
比如……在你住的地方放一场史上最闪亮的烟花秀？或者出其不意，于重重守卫中盗走她们最重要的城主大人——
嗯——说到后者，好像已经成功一半了？
少女忍者露出狡黠的笑容，在空中以另一种轻柔的节奏摆动起来。
嘿嘿~没错，现在就是我们俩的独处时间哦！
这么难得的舞台，不想来和我跳支舞吗？
我保证，会让你充分体验这场舞会的乐趣哦~！城主大人~

白兔与梦乡.say: 正当我为应对各地肆虐的妖魔鬼怪焦头烂额时，岛风带回了一个令人振奋的好消息——
临近的兔兔城主响应了我们的召集请求，并邀请我前往城外的林间商谈具体事宜，形势一片大好。
我早早抵达了约定的地点，温暖的阳光透过林地层层叠翠，洒下斑驳光影，空气中浮动着淡淡的松香。
片刻之后，我就以一种未曾设想的方式见到了这位盟友……
Zzzz……Zzzz……
白兔与梦乡.actorName: 拉菲II [兔兔城主的巡游间隙]

白兔与梦乡.say: 一群兔子浩浩荡荡地在林间小径中蹦跶着，最后在我的面前停下。
白兔与梦乡.actorName: 拉菲II [兔兔城主的巡游间隙]

白兔与梦乡.say: 为首的兔兔背上，少女睡得正酣。
白兔与梦乡.actorName: 拉菲II [兔兔城主的巡游间隙]

白兔与梦乡.say: 呼啊……已经到了吗……？
白兔与梦乡.actorName: 拉菲II [兔兔城主的巡游间隙]

白兔与梦乡.say: 尊贵的兔兔城城主，拉菲……响应盟友的召集而来……
白兔与梦乡.actorName: 拉菲II [兔兔城主的巡游间隙]

白兔与梦乡.say: 别担心，拉菲会帮助你……一起讨伐那些捣乱的妖魔的……
白兔与梦乡.actorName: 拉菲II [兔兔城主的巡游间隙]

白兔与梦乡.say: 不过……唔……
白兔与梦乡.actorName: 拉菲II [兔兔城主的巡游间隙]

白兔与梦乡.say: 城主指挥官，你看上去好疲惫……
白兔与梦乡.actorName: 拉菲II [兔兔城主的巡游间隙]

白兔与梦乡.say: 拉菲觉得，你需要好好睡一觉了……
白兔与梦乡.actorName: 拉菲II [兔兔城主的巡游间隙]

白兔与梦乡.say: 拉菲的兔兔城堡里，有取之不尽的枕头……棉被和床褥，也管够的……
白兔与梦乡.actorName: 拉菲II [兔兔城主的巡游间隙]

白兔与梦乡.say: 要不然……你先跟拉菲一起回兔兔城吧？
白兔与梦乡.actorName: 拉菲II [兔兔城主的巡游间隙]

白兔与梦乡.say: 那城里肆虐的妖魔鬼怪要怎么办？
白兔与梦乡.actorName: {playername}

白兔与梦乡.say: 唔……好麻烦，那我们还是尽快赶去你的城堡吧。
白兔与梦乡.actorName: 拉菲II [兔兔城主的巡游间隙]

白兔与梦乡.say: 不过睡眠也不能落下……
白兔与梦乡.actorName: 拉菲II [兔兔城主的巡游间隙]

白兔与梦乡.say: 这样好了，城主指挥官……你快到大兔兔的身上来。
白兔与梦乡.actorName: 拉菲II [兔兔城主的巡游间隙]

白兔与梦乡.say: 拉菲举起双手伸了个懒腰，然后自然地牵起我的手，将我拉到了这个和世界观完全没法融合在一起的巨大兔兔坐骑上。
白兔与梦乡.actorName: 拉菲II [兔兔城主的巡游间隙]

白兔与梦乡.say: 唔……这样就好了……大兔兔，出发！
白兔与梦乡.actorName: 拉菲II [兔兔城主的巡游间隙]

白兔与梦乡.say: 然后……拉菲困了，城主指挥官，我们一起睡……
白兔与梦乡.actorName: 拉菲II [兔兔城主的巡游间隙]

白兔与梦乡.say: 一起睡……忘掉所有的烦恼……
白兔与梦乡.actorName: 拉菲II [兔兔城主的巡游间隙]

白兔与梦乡.say: 轻柔的呼吸拂过，带着一丝香甜的气息。
白兔与梦乡.actorName: 拉菲II [兔兔城主的巡游间隙]

白兔与梦乡.say: Zzzz……
白兔与梦乡.actorName: 拉菲II [兔兔城主的巡游间隙]

白兔与梦乡.say: Zzzz……
白兔与梦乡.actorName: {playername}

白兔与梦乡.say: 如在云端的柔软触感中，我与拉菲双双坠入了梦乡——
白兔与梦乡.actorName: 拉菲II [兔兔城主的巡游间隙]

千代誓.say: 托岛风送出援军召集信，很快得到了回应。
以精准高效而闻名的公家大小姐加斯科涅，亲自率领运输队携大批物资驰援城池。
此刻，她邀请我前往庭院一隅的静谧池畔散步，说是要交接物资清单，却似乎另有用意。
新入库物资……包含应急维修材料、生存补给以及各类建筑耗材。
运输通道……已优化，确保后续供给效率最大化。
城主指挥官大人，物资清点工作已基本完成，请您确认。
我看到预计送达的精铁箭镞有三千枚，实际入库却有七千枚？
多出的，是加斯科涅的心意。
更多支援还在路上。
有加斯科涅在，您无需担忧。
这样一番清点过后，城内的形势明显乐观了许多。
紧绷的神经随之放松下来后，庭院内静候多时的美景自然映入眼帘。
凉风穿庭而过，掠过枝梢，卷起两三片红枫在空中摇曳起舞，落入池中又漾开一圈圈涟漪。
不过，加斯科涅此行的目的，并不仅仅是交付物资……
加斯科涅停下脚步，望向我的平静目光仿佛能穿透表象。
根据过往的信息分析，城主大人现在最需要的，是更多的物资和保障……
……也是“支持”和“陪伴”。
信息无处不在。
我只是，格外关注您的情感和渴望。
加斯科涅，一直在关注城主大人的行动。
您有任何需求，都可以告知加斯科涅。加斯科涅会替您实现。
物资，只是一种可视化的、便于传递的载体。
它们会被消耗，会被更新。
但其中承载的回应——不会改变。
至于具体的回应内容应该是什么，加斯科涅也想了很久。
最后也只是得出了一个简单的结论。
“陪伴”并非一时，而应当是长久的、持续的。
加斯科涅的话语不夹带任何华丽的辞藻，却直率到让人无法回避。
她轻轻移动步伐，走到我的身边。
加斯科涅，会始终站在您的身边，站在任何您需要的位置。
即便您并没有给予我任何指令——我依旧会拥护您、支持您，直至永恒。
无论指挥官要先前往哪里，都请带着加斯科涅。
谢谢，你给我的支援相当珍贵。
收到您的反馈，城主大人。
加斯科涅感到了……“喜悦”……？
这样的体验，很特殊。但是……
……加斯科涅，感觉良好。
可以的话，加斯科涅想要了解更多。
请继续向加斯科涅……输入您的，“喜悦”。

天守绘影.say: 天守阁修复完成后，办公区域终于重新开放。
就在我准备与堆积如山的书信血战到底之时，余光中瞥见了一抹黑色的身影。
举目望去，她正站在天守阁的制高点位，银白的发丝和紧束的黑色劲装化作一道危险的剪影。
月色的照耀下，她正在全神贯注地绘制着城池的地图。
……唔，还有几处建筑的位置和样式需要修正。
可惜，时间不够了。
城主同志，你来得不是时候呢。
她利落地将地图收入怀中，身姿轻盈地纵身跃入月中。
下一秒，又带着冰冷的夜风欺身而至，冰蓝色的眼眸锐利如刀，审视着我。
但至少证明情报无误……平日里处在重重护卫之下的你，唯独这种时刻，才会独自现身。
毕竟加班这种事，不好连累其他人。
是吗？那真是便宜我了。
既然时间充裕，不如猜猜我的打算吧，城主同志？
是点到为止，拿着这张未完成的地图离开，还是……带着你一起走？
呵呵呵，我更偏向后一个选项呢。
计划不错，但计划总是赶不上变化。
……你布下了埋伏？
虽然语气还有些惊诧，但干练的忍者已经敏捷地再次腾空，浮游于星幕与银月之间。
她的视线扫过我身后空无一人的侧缘，又投向下方寂静的庭院——
——最后回到我的脸上，似乎在评估这句话的真实性。
既然如此，我就不便打扰了。
先撤了。
她的身影如轻燕般一瞬间跃过朱红的栏杆，朝着另一侧屋顶疾掠而去。
而我则在假装追逐她的过程中调整着自己所处的位置。
果然，这场追逐战持续的时间并不久，不过几个呼吸间，她便地刹住车，神情有了明显的变化。
不对。
屋檐上没有弓箭手，四下也没有见到伏兵的踪迹。
这里，只有你。
原来如此，好一个虚张声势呢。城主同志的胆子越来越大了，呵呵。
她屈膝抬腿，指尖拂过绑在大腿上的苦无，语气难得带上了一丝玩味。
这一刻，她不再是谨慎的猎物，而是锁定目标的猎手。
现在，游戏规则该改一改了。
要不要给你几分钟的时间，让你先开始逃跑呢？
……还是不了，现在这样就很有趣。
轮到我来追你了哦，城主同志。
月光勾勒出她紧致的腰线，银白的长发飒爽飞扬。
她追逐着我进入黑暗的房间，意在终结这场追逐战。
就在这千钧一发之际，我按下了墙壁上一处不起眼的凸起——
机括轻响，飞丝射出，瞬间织就了一张覆盖她身周的密网。
她眼中闪过一丝错愕，身体则自觉行动起来。
可是，为了躲避危险而做出的行动反而令她越陷越深。
咕唔……衣服被丝线割裂了……
原来如此。不会割伤中招之人的身体，却又足以划破衣服、妨碍行动的丝线吗……
这到底是城主同志的仁慈，亦或者……是你想看到的情景呢？
无论是哪种，看来我都该为你的成功道喜了。
她被迫双膝微曲半俯下身，贴身穿着的忍装已有多处破裂。
银发凌乱地贴在四上，伴随着细碎的喘息轻轻颤动。
但即使面对这样插翅难飞的窘境，她的神情也没有丝毫动摇。
利用最开始的虚张声势，让我在之后放下警惕……
……最终成功引诱我主动落入你的陷阱。
虽然不是早有预谋，但这种临阵决断、以智克敌的能力，确实令人折服。
那么现在……
你已经想好，要对我做什么了吗？
如果还没来得及想好，我也可以……为你提供一些方案。
比如……身为“忍者五人众”的我，接下来将会暗中为你效力。
你在明处，我在暗处，我们一同管理这座不可思议的桃园之城如何？
没有反对……呵呵，看来我的提案很有吸引力呢。
我相信，你会很好地使用我的力量的。
不过，在我们携手离开之前……
先为我找一件完整的衣服，可以吗……？

居所的深夜访客.say: 修复的进程终于进展到了御殿——我本应位于本丸的居所。
经过连续多日操劳，身体早已疲惫不堪，终于可以好好睡一觉了。
就在我沐浴结束，正准备吹灭蜡烛时，窗户位置突然传来一声脆响——
哇啊……疼疼疼……！
居所的深夜访客.actorName: 关岛 [女忍者的危险综艺秀]

居所的深夜访客.say: 踩中陷阱了……虽然好像也是情理之中……
居所的深夜访客.actorName: 关岛 [女忍者的危险综艺秀]

居所的深夜访客.say: 但竟然设置在这种视角最好的位置……难道没有人懂得享受窗边的风景吗~！
居所的深夜访客.actorName: 关岛 [女忍者的危险综艺秀]

居所的深夜访客.say: 借着朦胧的月光，我找到了响声的源头。
居所的深夜访客.actorName: 关岛 [女忍者的危险综艺秀]

居所的深夜访客.say: 一位身穿忍者服的少女以一个相当极限的姿势卡在了破损的窗框里，在陷阱的阻碍下动弹不得。
居所的深夜访客.actorName: 关岛 [女忍者的危险综艺秀]

居所的深夜访客.say: 依托双手支撑，她勉强维持住了身体的重心，无暇顾及的长发随意飘散，一地凌乱。
居所的深夜访客.actorName: 关岛 [女忍者的危险综艺秀]

居所的深夜访客.say: “以完美的姿态潜入御殿，对我来说是理所当然的啦~☆”
居所的深夜访客.actorName: 关岛 [女忍者的危险综艺秀]

居所的深夜访客.say: 本想说这样的开场白的~
居所的深夜访客.actorName: 关岛 [女忍者的危险综艺秀]

居所的深夜访客.say: 可没想到……窗户上有拌索陷阱！
居所的深夜访客.actorName: 关岛 [女忍者的危险综艺秀]

居所的深夜访客.say: 窗户、门、屋顶……所有位置都替你们考虑到了。
居所的深夜访客.actorName: {playername}

居所的深夜访客.say: 不过，你们这些忍者的偏好路线还真好猜啊。
居所的深夜访客.actorName: {playername}

居所的深夜访客.say: 哼~现在得意忘形也太早了！
居所的深夜访客.actorName: 关岛 [女忍者的危险综艺秀]

居所的深夜访客.say: 对于“忍者五人众”之一的关岛来说，这种小场面……才……才难不倒我~！
居所的深夜访客.actorName: 关岛 [女忍者的危险综艺秀]

居所的深夜访客.say: 她鼓了鼓脸颊，奋力用小臂撑起上身，试图摆脱这窘迫的境地。
居所的深夜访客.actorName: 关岛 [女忍者的危险综艺秀]

居所的深夜访客.say: 可无论怎样扭动，被卡在窗户里的身体都纹丝不动，又因为重心失衡反复滑落，处境愈发糟糕。
居所的深夜访客.actorName: 关岛 [女忍者的危险综艺秀]

居所的深夜访客.say: 呼……呼……没力气了……
居所的深夜访客.actorName: 关岛 [女忍者的危险综艺秀]

居所的深夜访客.say: 现在连衣服都卡住了……这可是关岛特意定制的夜行服呢，呜呜~
居所的深夜访客.actorName: 关岛 [女忍者的危险综艺秀]

居所的深夜访客.say: 城主大人，你在看什么呢……咦？胸口……啊，别、别看啦！
居所的深夜访客.actorName: 关岛 [女忍者的危险综艺秀]

居所的深夜访客.say: 关岛虽然不是专业的忍者，但也不允许这样的失误！嗯，再试一次吧，最后一次——
居所的深夜访客.actorName: 关岛 [女忍者的危险综艺秀]

居所的深夜访客.say: ……一无所获呢。嘿嘿，关岛放弃了！
居所的深夜访客.actorName: 关岛 [女忍者的危险综艺秀]

居所的深夜访客.say: 看来只凭我一个人，是没法脱困的……既然这样……
居所的深夜访客.actorName: 关岛 [女忍者的危险综艺秀]

居所的深夜访客.say: 那就只能拜托城主大人啦~快来帮帮陷入危机的关岛吧~
居所的深夜访客.actorName: 关岛 [女忍者的危险综艺秀]

居所的深夜访客.say: 这算是……投降了？
居所的深夜访客.actorName: {playername}

居所的深夜访客.say: 没错~维持这个姿势这么久，我的腿已经麻了啦……
居所的深夜访客.actorName: 关岛 [女忍者的危险综艺秀]

居所的深夜访客.say: 关岛投降~城主大人，快来救救我吧~
居所的深夜访客.actorName: 关岛 [女忍者的危险综艺秀]

居所的深夜访客.say: 于是我走到窗台前，正想俯身解除机关，她却突然扣住了我手腕，转眼间就如灵蛇般缠上我的腰身。
居所的深夜访客.actorName: 关岛 [女忍者的危险综艺秀]

居所的深夜访客.say: 城主大人……还是太小看关岛了呢~
居所的深夜访客.actorName: 关岛 [女忍者的危险综艺秀]

居所的深夜访客.say: 刚才被你看见了这么丢人的开场，必须要想办法扳回一城才行！
居所的深夜访客.actorName: 关岛 [女忍者的危险综艺秀]

居所的深夜访客.say: 嘿嘿，你觉得我想要做什么……？
居所的深夜访客.actorName: 关岛 [女忍者的危险综艺秀]

居所的深夜访客.say: 别担心~都说了我已经投降了啦♪
居所的深夜访客.actorName: 关岛 [女忍者的危险综艺秀]

居所的深夜访客.say: 这股香味……城主大人刚刚是在沐浴么？难怪连衣服都没穿好呢~
居所的深夜访客.actorName: 关岛 [女忍者的危险综艺秀]

居所的深夜访客.say: 看来我的突然造访打扰了你的私人时间呢……
居所的深夜访客.actorName: 关岛 [女忍者的危险综艺秀]

居所的深夜访客.say: 作为赔罪，就让关岛来帮城主大人……好好地穿上衣服吧~
居所的深夜访客.actorName: 关岛 [女忍者的危险综艺秀]

居所的深夜访客.say: 放心，无论条件再苛刻，忍者关岛都能顺利完成任务……
居所的深夜访客.actorName: 关岛 [女忍者的危险综艺秀]

居所的深夜访客.say: 接下来，就请城主大人认真感受关岛投诚的诚意吧~
居所的深夜访客.actorName: 关岛 [女忍者的危险综艺秀]

缭乱之忍.say: 主公大人……您的茶凉了，请让白凤为您更换。
缭乱之忍.actorName: 白凤 [缭乱之花的忍者游戏]

缭乱之忍.say: 主公大人每日要批阅如此多的文书，正需要清香醒神。若允许白凤随侍左右，必不会遗漏这最基础的礼数……
缭乱之忍.actorName: 白凤 [缭乱之花的忍者游戏]

缭乱之忍.say: 主公大人？主公大人……主公大人——这次，可不许再轻易释放白凤了哦~
缭乱之忍.actorName: 白凤 [缭乱之花的忍者游戏]

缭乱之忍.say: 关于这只不愿离开的白鸟从何而来——事情还要从茶室修复完成之后说起。
缭乱之忍.actorName: 白凤 [缭乱之花的忍者游戏]

缭乱之忍.say: 设定上，为了妥善存放宝物，我曾在天守阁内打造了一间自带密室的茶室。
结果在茶室修复完成的当天，前去检查宝物状况的我，遭遇了埋伏已久的白凤的袭击。
在顺利俘虏对方之后，就出现了如今的情况……
主公大人，您知道吗……
缭乱之忍.actorName: 白凤 [缭乱之花的忍者游戏]

缭乱之忍.say: 在遇见您之前，那些绮丽的绢帛美玉，才是我追求的璀璨至宝……
缭乱之忍.actorName: 白凤 [缭乱之花的忍者游戏]

缭乱之忍.say: 但现在……它们都在您的光环下黯然失色了。
缭乱之忍.actorName: 白凤 [缭乱之花的忍者游戏]

缭乱之忍.say: 比起盗取那些冰冷冷的死物，白凤更渴望的……是成为您的宝物啊~
缭乱之忍.actorName: 白凤 [缭乱之花的忍者游戏]

缭乱之忍.say: 请您用这双手……这双温柔又坚定的手，拥抱白凤吧~
缭乱之忍.actorName: 白凤 [缭乱之花的忍者游戏]

缭乱之忍.say: ……主公大人？主公大人有在听白凤说话吗？
缭乱之忍.actorName: 白凤 [缭乱之花的忍者游戏]

缭乱之忍.say: 难道……就因为白凤曾经是“忍者五人众”之一，您就不愿意收容我了吗？
缭乱之忍.actorName: 白凤 [缭乱之花的忍者游戏]

缭乱之忍.say: 白凤微微红了眼角，露出泫然欲泣的神情。
缭乱之忍.actorName: 白凤 [缭乱之花的忍者游戏]

缭乱之忍.say: ……没记错的话，我已经签署过释放你的条令了。
缭乱之忍.actorName: {playername}

缭乱之忍.say: 您一定是记错了。
缭乱之忍.actorName: 白凤 [缭乱之花的忍者游戏]

缭乱之忍.say: 白凤是个罪无可恕的女人，不仅趁乱潜入城内，还意图袭击您……
缭乱之忍.actorName: 白凤 [缭乱之花的忍者游戏]

缭乱之忍.say: 那日我将刀刃指向您，便注定今生今世都该是您的囚徒。
缭乱之忍.actorName: 白凤 [缭乱之花的忍者游戏]

缭乱之忍.say: 从此往后，都要一心一意地奉您为白凤的主公。
缭乱之忍.actorName: 白凤 [缭乱之花的忍者游戏]

缭乱之忍.say: 至于文书？嗯……呀，白凤想起来了~
缭乱之忍.actorName: 白凤 [缭乱之花的忍者游戏]

缭乱之忍.say: 白凤外头思索了片刻，突然露出了甜蜜的微笑。
缭乱之忍.actorName: 白凤 [缭乱之花的忍者游戏]

缭乱之忍.say: 对呢，那天将文书烧了的时候，忘记唤您一起来看了。
缭乱之忍.actorName: 白凤 [缭乱之花的忍者游戏]

缭乱之忍.say: 我可不相信，主公大人会下达这样残酷的命令呢~
缭乱之忍.actorName: 白凤 [缭乱之花的忍者游戏]

缭乱之忍.say: 当然，倘若您真的下定决心要遣送白凤也会遵命的。只是……
缭乱之忍.actorName: 白凤 [缭乱之花的忍者游戏]

缭乱之忍.say: 白凤垂下眼，一道冷冽刀光悄然映在眼底——出鞘长刀不知何时已横卧在她身侧。
缭乱之忍.actorName: 白凤 [缭乱之花的忍者游戏]

缭乱之忍.say: 纤细指尖擦过刀刃，一丝血珠立刻从指腹沁出。
缭乱之忍.actorName: 白凤 [缭乱之花的忍者游戏]

缭乱之忍.say: 见状，她唇边忽然浮现出一抹餍足的笑。
缭乱之忍.actorName: 白凤 [缭乱之花的忍者游戏]

缭乱之忍.say: 哎呀，好疼呢……
缭乱之忍.actorName: 白凤 [缭乱之花的忍者游戏]

缭乱之忍.say: 主公大人，您看，我不小心受伤了，还需要您的照顾呢……
缭乱之忍.actorName: 白凤 [缭乱之花的忍者游戏]

缭乱之忍.say: 头也有些晕了……白凤要坐不稳了呢……
缭乱之忍.actorName: 白凤 [缭乱之花的忍者游戏]

缭乱之忍.say: 主公大人，别推开我……就让白凤这样静静地靠着您吧~
缭乱之忍.actorName: 白凤 [缭乱之花的忍者游戏]

缭乱之忍.say: 主公大人果然不忍心看到白凤再次受伤呢……
缭乱之忍.actorName: 白凤 [缭乱之花的忍者游戏]

缭乱之忍.say: 既然如此，就请您成为白凤的依靠吧~
缭乱之忍.actorName: 白凤 [缭乱之花的忍者游戏]

缭乱之忍.say: 请把我留在身边，主公大人，留在离您最近的地方……
缭乱之忍.actorName: 白凤 [缭乱之花的忍者游戏]

缭乱之忍.say: 白凤，会成为您独一无二的宝物。
缭乱之忍.actorName: 白凤 [缭乱之花的忍者游戏]

缭乱之忍.say: 比任何珠宝都更加美丽、更加耀眼，更是……只属于您一人的，白凤~
缭乱之忍.actorName: 白凤 [缭乱之花的忍者游戏]

sequence: In a fantastic wonderland, there stood a grand and fantastical castle.
This castle, ruled by one fantastical Lord Commander, guarded a fantastical treasure.
It attracted all the world's avarice and greed, like a lighthouse for vessels in the dead of night, vied for by every man.
However, a fantastical spell guarded this treasure, allowing none but the Lord Commander to approach it.
Therefore, all the evil powers that covet this treasure decided to join forces.
They performed a wicked ceremony that caused a fantastical earthquake, reducing the once prosperous land into a ruin.
The grand castle and the protective spell alike, too, crumbled into pieces.
With the treasure unguarded, those seeking to claim it for themselves descend upon the castle like an avalanche.
Soon, this treasured land shall devolve into a battlefield.
Luckily, there is still time before this happens.

Chapter One.say: Lord Commander, please forgive my discourtesy, but there is an emergency!
The barrier guarding your treasure collapsed in that tremendous earthquake, and fell ninjas seeking to thieve it have infiltrated the castle!
W-worse yet, the youkai hitherto suppressed by the barrier have all broken out...
The four areas of the castle – the buffer zone, the outer citadel, the eastern enclosure, and the inner citadel – have all sustained major damage! The buildings and defenses need immediate repair!
Our communications with the outside have been severed! We are isolated, Milord!
Hmm. I roughly understand the situation.
But why are we being attacked BY ninjas? Isn't this story titled, "Ninja Castle"? As in, the castle OF the ninjas?
Ahem! Please pay no mind to such trivial matters!

options.content: Tighten the defenses around the treasure.
Change the story's name before we continue.

Chapter One.say: W-we request your orders, Milord! What shall we do?
Yes, Milord! We shall repair the castle and guard the treasure!
Yes, Milord! We shall repair the castle and guard the treasure!
Yes, Mi– Wait, no! We need to repair the castle and guard the treasure!
I suggest that we begin repairs with the buffer zone!
Why can't we start with the inner citadel?
Because... the story progression will fall apart then.
Oh, okay. In that case – you're in charge of the repair work.
Understood, Milord!
Suzutsuki, see to the repairs of all our stations and defensive structures. We must restore the castle to operation and prevent further infiltrations.
Roger! Pooky and I will do the best we can!
Harutsuki, please reconstruct the barrier. We must get the youkai back under the seal.
U-understood!
Lastly, Shimakaze, when the time is ripe, send a request for assistance to our allies.
Yes! Ready am I to move ahead at full speed!
I've now issued all the orders, Milord. I shall continue gathering intelligence, and I will provide you with regular updates on the repairs!
Alright. Let's get this show on the road.

Buffer Zone Repairs Complete.say: Lord Commander, the buffer zone has been repaired. I shall now report on our current status.
Under Suzutsuki's supervision, repairs were completed on the longhouses, the rice granary, and the reservoir.
The food and water situation has eased up a lot, and everyone can finally get a good night's sleep.
Harutsuki, meanwhile, discovered a way to reconstruct the barrier. I believe she'll soon make progress with it.
Her magic circle has also managed to suppress the youkai in the buffer zone, putting the castle residents' hearts at peace.
Furthermore, the ronin who answered your summons, Warspite, has been of service...
She has set up guardhouses around the castle, and is working hard to restore peace and order.
I think we're ready to refocus our manpower on the next stage of repairs.
Yes! Due to it being close to the epicenter, it has taken quite extensive damage.
All manner of official documents are stored in the premises, and it's very likely they've already caught the eye of enemy ninjas.
Okay. Let's start on those repairs ASAP.
Understood! I shall relay your orders!

Outer Citadel Repairs Complete.say: Following the buffer zone, the outer citadel's repairs are now complete. Inexperienced though I may be, I hope I've been of service to you, Milord.
Allow me to brief you on the particulars!
Firstly, about the protective barrier – Harutsuki has settled on a plan for reconstruction. It can commence as soon as the materials are in order.
Unfortunately, we cannot do it while dealing with the youkai at the same time. A reliable helper is required.
Also, I have some good news!
That renowned instrumentalist – Brennus – has answered your invitation.
Her music has greatly improved morale around the castle, and her first concert was already fully packed.
Next, regarding the repairs Suzutsuki is in charge of – the ancillary tower, the training ground, and the inner citadel bridge have been restored.
In addition, we've gathered much data from the ninjas you arrested.
The infamous syndicate that they served – the Ninja Five – will likely interfere in various ways in our upcoming repair work.
The probability of unforeseen circumstances increases the longer we take. I propose that we first restore the barracks in the eastern enclosure, and strengthen our standing force within the castle.
This will let us take action should the need arise, and seize the initiative.
What do you think of this?
We'll focus on the eastern enclosure next. Do everything we can.
Your will is my command, Milord!

Eastern Enclosure Repairs Complete.say: Milord, I come with a report on the eastern enclosure.
Though it occupies less real estate, repairing it is by no means easier than it was for the last two zones.
The damaged weapons in the barracks and armory alone were enough to give Suzutsuki a headache.
But rest assured! The weapons have been tempered and polished to perfection. They've been restored to their former glory.
There are developments in Harutsuki's reconstruction, as well. We have assembled the necessary materials for the barrier and can now focus on the actual repairs.
I was initially worried that we were too short-handed to drive back the youkai threat, but fortunately, the situation has improved.
Lady Laffey and her Legion of Bunnies have done a spectacular job of making up for our manpower shortage.
Likewise, Gascogne's generous donations of repair supplies have alleviated our once-oppressive logistical burdens.

options.content: What do YOU think we should do?

Eastern Enclosure Repairs Complete.say: The time has come. Now's our chance to repair the inner citadel in one fell swoop.
Enemy ninjas will be desperate to turn the tide. Stay vigilant.
Worry not. I'll handle every last detail!
Under your capable command, we are fully prepared and united.
As a result, I believe we're able to focus our efforts on repairing the inner citadel.
Even should the enemy ninjas attempt a last stand, they're no match for us now.
Perfect. Get to it right away.

Happily Ever After.say: Lord Commander, the restoration of the inner citadel is complete!
According to Suzutsuki, she has led a comprehensive effort to upgrade all facilities as they were being repaired in order to prevent any such mishaps in the future.
Measures have also been taken to shelter us from the heat of summer and the chill of winter.
No effort has been spared in making this castle a comfortable place for all seasons!
Not to mention the extensive reinforcements we've made to the castle tower and other defensive facilities.
Should another attack occur, we will be able to handle it with ease.
There were, of course, some unexpected occurrences amidst the repairs...
I mean the dastardly Ninja Five! They've been hiding in the shadows and trying to swipe our treasure.
But you predicted this attack and foiled their plans in spectacular fashion. Most importantly, you kept everyone safe.
The situation in the castle is stable now. Even the enemy intruders have sworn fealty to you, and the troublesome youkai have all surrendered.
And I have more good news from Harutsuki. The barrier has been successfully reconstructed.
However, it only obeys orders from the owner of the treasure – you, of course – so we must ask that you do the honors yourself.
Please ascend the castle tower and let your glory shine upon the castle anew!
Thus, the Lord Commander did ascend the tower.
A pillar of light rose high into the sky and spread out as a translucent dome over the castle.
The fantastical protective spell was restored, and the fantastical castle stood tall and proud once more.
All conspiracies and evil schemes ended in failure, and a new era of peace began in this fantastical wonderland.

sequence: Turmoil in the Ninja Castle - The End

Blooming Upon a Bewitching Night.say: Sometime after repairs on the castle's longhouses were complete, rumors began spreading that an oni had appeared there.
"A long-horned oni who feigns kindness to lost travelers at night, luring them in then dragging them into the shadows."
I've got to test and see how much of it is true or not.
So it is for that reason that you've come, Milord.
Donned in a black gown, Asama leans against the low table next to her.
She gently plays with the wick of the flame beside her using her long nails. In the wavering light, her expression is lost to the shadows.
You say you wish to grasp the truth behind the rumors...
Your actions betray your carelessness, however – entering a dangerous place in the dead of night by one's lonesome can hardly be called rational.
She speaks in a hushed tone, hiding her smile with her hand as she subtly leans closer. A sense of temptation undertones her voice.
How ghastly it would be if the long-horned oni were no further than right behind you.
As fortune would have it, you speak now not with any oni, but with the kindhearted lady of the longhouses. Heehee.
So then, why is it that you appear unsettled?
Ah... You must forgive my discourtesy. I've forgotten to serve you tea.
Please partake of this tea, Milord, and let it warm and nourish you.
To ease the hearts of lost travelers is, after all, the duty of the lady of the longhouses.
The tea has a nice fragrance with a strange hint of sweetness.
A wave of sleepiness overwhelms me, beguiled as I am by her graceful service and the tea she served.
Heehee. Do you wish to set off to the land of dreams so soon, Milord?
I know that you are always a busy person, so allow yourself a moment of peace, and just fall asleep by my side.
May this night most deep be your eternal resting place.
She removes her black garment like a breeze lifting the fog covering the truth, revealing the bare skin beneath that glows with an unhumanly white luster.
Her shadow from the lamplight stretches and bends, and a pair of frightening horns begins to grow.
Then, the next moment, it disperses.
...Why didn't it work? Has my power... left me?
Lord Commander of the fantastical castle... It seems that you came prepared.
Never before have I been so completely and utterly suppressed...
She leans down, and gently rubs the back of my hand with her cool cheek.
In that case...
I shall submit to you in earnest, and humbly serve you as my lord.
My power shall be yours to wield and command.
As your most faithful shadow, I will bring an end to your foes...
Then, when you open your heart to me, unknowingly revealing your weakness...
When that moment comes... Heheheh...
Her voice, although as light as a whisper, conceals an unbearable hunger.
That is when I shall help myself to your taste... and I shall savor it...

Onigiri Encounter.say: After some emergency repairs, the last hole in the rice granary was finally patched up, bringing the castle's food situation back on track.
Just as I'm about to shut the door to the granary, I hear a rustling sound.
Ugh... I'm sooo hungry...
I disguised myself just to get in here, but I've not had a bite to eat...
But now, that hunger's going bye-bye! Soon, all the food here will be mine, mine, mine!
A young ninja girl pokes her face out from a tree, and she carefully scans her surroundings.
Hey, what's that on the ground? Are those onigiri?
Should've expected as much of the place that stocks the whole castle's food – there's even tasty treats just lying on the ground! Well, don't mind if I do!
Huh? Why is there a rope around the– Whuaaahhh!
Caught myself a sneaky ninja. This onigiri trap is really effective.
You'd be wise to confess what you came here for.
Dang! It was a trap!
Ugh... Give up! I'm a seasoned kunoichi, and I'll never cave in under violence!
Unless... *glances at the onigiri*
You can have as many as you want if you tell the truth.
Okay, Lord Commander, I'll tell you everything!
I'm just some small fry who got sent on the most exhausting and dangerous scouting mission ever. I'm not a bad guy, I promise!
The Ninja Five set off before me, and they should've deeply infiltrated the castle by this point!
If I were you, I'd watch my back, Lord Commander!
Come again? "The Ninja Five"?
That means at least five infiltrators – or maybe even six or seven – are in our midst.
I'll need to speed up the castle's repairs.
Now I've told you everything I know!
If you won't let me eat these onigiri, I think... I think I might pass out from hunger!
Huh? I can have them all? Om, nom!
Shooo good! I hereby pledge my loyalty to you, wise and generous Lord Commander!
And don't get the wrong idea – I'm no freeloader!
The more I get to eat, the harder I'll work!
So, whenever you need this ever-elusive kunoichi and master of disguise who comes and goes without a trace, I'll be there to answer your call!

Lakeside Lure.say: After being dry for days, our reservoir was filled with clear water again, alleviating our concerns about the castle's water supply for the time being.
However, I've heard rumors that the reservoir's supply is extremely irregular at certain times of day, so I've come to investigate.
Just as I arrive, I hear a faint cry for help coming from the lakeside.
Heeelp! Somebody heeelp!
There is a girl stuck in a strange face-down pose with her hands tied. She seems to be on the brink of collapsing and falling into the water.
I heard humans fall for this trick easily... It's a bit unorthodox, but it's worth a shot.
...Oh, someone's actually showed up.
*cough cough*! Somebody! Anybody!
I've been ensnared by an evil youkai from the reservoir! Help meee!
Aahh, I can't swim! I'm so scared...
Hey, you – why are you just standing there and staring at me?
Surely a heart as kind as yours wouldn't ignore a girl crying for help, would it?
Or do you get your kicks from watching me flounder around helplessly?
Alright, then in exchange for saving me...
She slightly lifts her head. Wet tufts of long hair stick to her soft lips, making her look extra fragile and endearing.
Won't you come closer? Or else I really will be in danger.
Honestly, your acting's pretty good.
The knot gives it away, though. You tied it yourself, didn't you?
What?! How... How can you tell?
I'm the lord of the castle. I know how a knot was tied from looking at it.
Realizing that I've seen through her lie, the girl's arms slowly stop squirming, and she cracks a poorly-concealed, cunning smile.
Heehee. So you won't be fooled...
I was going to catch you off guard and strike when you got close.
Such a shame you're forcing me to use direct, brutal means♪
Crawling on her stomach, she approaches me, and then suddenly undoes the knot around her wrists.
Although she leaps at me without a moment's hesitation, she halts right the next moment, as though stopped by some invisible force.
Why?! I can't move... What did you do to me?!
Would you believe me if I said "nothing"?
No, I get it now. You're known as the fantastical Lord Commander for a reason. Your fantastical power has completely suppressed me...
*sigh*... You've literally immobilized me here...
I guess this is what they mean by "you reap what you sow."
You're the one who's responsible for the reservoir's irregularity, aren't you?
Hey, now that's just slander. I'm merely an insignificant youkai who lives here.
Even youkai have to drink water, you know. I don't wanna freak out passersby, so I only come out at certain times of the day.
I'll stop attacking humans, okay? Just let me go.
Hello? Cat got your tongue, Milord? Should I take your silence as a "yes"?
Heehee, then I need to repay this kindness you've shown me...
I still can't move, though, so...
How about you come a little closer, hm? Don't be alarmed, just accept my gratitude♪

The Watermelon Ronin.say: Shimakaze galloped in with a message from afar. It said that an outstanding ronin had responded to my invitation.
There was a location stated in the message – an isolated bamboo grove – which I made my way to.
Now, the further I head into the grove, the more cut bamboo I see around me. I can easily infer that someone has been honing their skills here.
Whew. Good. That's half of my daily training done in– Who goes there?!
The Watermelon Ronin.actorName: Warspite [The Grand Old Lady Sunders All]

The Watermelon Ronin.say: Oh. Apologies. You must be the one I shall serve.
The Watermelon Ronin.actorName: Warspite [The Grand Old Lady Sunders All]

The Watermelon Ronin.say: I've been waiting for you here this whole time.
The Watermelon Ronin.actorName: Warspite [The Grand Old Lady Sunders All]

The Watermelon Ronin.say: The girl holding a bamboo sword has just finished a round of practice swings. Sweat drips from her forehead.
The Watermelon Ronin.actorName: Warspite [The Grand Old Lady Sunders All]

The Watermelon Ronin.say: Upon noticing me, she nods in affirmation and gives me a signal.
The Watermelon Ronin.actorName: Warspite [The Grand Old Lady Sunders All]

The Watermelon Ronin.say: I read your letter. You seek soldiers to protect your castle.
The Watermelon Ronin.actorName: Warspite [The Grand Old Lady Sunders All]

The Watermelon Ronin.say: I am Warspite, a ronin. I've heeded your call.
The Watermelon Ronin.actorName: Warspite [The Grand Old Lady Sunders All]

The Watermelon Ronin.say: Hm? What's with that look? You seem unsure of what to say.
The Watermelon Ronin.actorName: Warspite [The Grand Old Lady Sunders All]

The Watermelon Ronin.say: Were you the one who cut down all these bamboo stalks?
The Watermelon Ronin.actorName: {playername}

The Watermelon Ronin.say: Naturally. A ronin must practice daily.
The Watermelon Ronin.actorName: Warspite [The Grand Old Lady Sunders All]

The Watermelon Ronin.say: And you did it with that wooden sword?
The Watermelon Ronin.actorName: {playername}

The Watermelon Ronin.say: A task that requires no effort on my part.
The Watermelon Ronin.actorName: Warspite [The Grand Old Lady Sunders All]

The Watermelon Ronin.say: Any ronin who desires a lord must be this adept to even be worth consideration.
The Watermelon Ronin.actorName: Warspite [The Grand Old Lady Sunders All]

The Watermelon Ronin.say: Allow me to demonstrate. This is the way in which I will slay evildoers!
The Watermelon Ronin.actorName: Warspite [The Grand Old Lady Sunders All]

The Watermelon Ronin.say: As soon as she finishes speaking, a watermelon appears in the air before being magnificently split in two right before my eyes.
The Watermelon Ronin.actorName: Warspite [The Grand Old Lady Sunders All]

The Watermelon Ronin.say: Eat it. It's very sweet.
The Watermelon Ronin.actorName: Warspite [The Grand Old Lady Sunders All]

The Watermelon Ronin.say: Huh. It IS sweet. This is some good watermelon.
The Watermelon Ronin.actorName: {playername}

The Watermelon Ronin.say: How do you evaluate my demonstration, hmm? Are you pleased?
The Watermelon Ronin.actorName: Warspite [The Grand Old Lady Sunders All]

The Watermelon Ronin.say: Yeah. You're something else. I'd love to hire you.
The Watermelon Ronin.actorName: {playername}

The Watermelon Ronin.say: You'll be provided with three meals a day, your own residence, and weapons and armor. You may also use the castle's training grounds as much as you want.
The Watermelon Ronin.actorName: {playername}

The Watermelon Ronin.say: In exchange, I want you to help maintain order within the castle.
The Watermelon Ronin.actorName: {playername}

The Watermelon Ronin.say: Splendid. I will not disappoint you, Lord Commander!
The Watermelon Ronin.actorName: Warspite [The Grand Old Lady Sunders All]

The Shape of a Room.say: A faint scent of tung oil still lingers in the ancillary tower, its interior graced by the beauty of fresh peach blossoms.
Moving the half-open sliding door aside, I turn my gaze to the lacquered cabinet in the inner room that stores secret documents – and to the visitor I had anticipated.
Oh dear... This is a chance encounter of the worst kind.
I simply wished to take advantage of the darkness of the night to borrow some of your "books" for my amusement...
You have my sincerest apologies for having disturbed your sweet dreams, Lord.
Not only that, you trespassed on the place where we store our important documents. Do you have any idea what the penalty is for that?
I've just arrived from afar, so please forgive my ignorance. Henceforth, I shall do better.
Unzen idly toys with the kunai at her waist, putting on a casual air to hide her inner vigilance.
It seems that despite my intention of merely borrowing some books...
I can scarcely hope to leave this small room unscathed.

Using her slender fingers, she softly pushes a scroll filled with confidential information into the drawer. There's not a hint of hostility in her movements; she's as nonchalant as if she were brushing off a bit of dust.
At the same time, she casts a glance behind me.
There is but one way out of this small room, and I am completely blocking it.
There is no need for us to make a scene in here.
Look at this room – it is too narrow for acrobatics.
I am not some rogue who would resort to a meaningless battle in such a constricting space.
Please, let us calm down and speak like civilized people.
Or would you rather claim your reward from this encounter in advance, my keen Lord?
She presents her dainty wrist, her supple skin appearing as fair as moonlight.
Then, before I can respond, her feet leap off the floor, and she closes the distance between us whilst revealing a rope she had hidden in her sleeve.
I shall capture yo– Eek!
Owch... It seems I carelessly hit the wall...
I much underestimated how narrow this room is...
Ahem. The victor has been decided, it appears. Well played.
...Did I even do anything?
I, Unzen, of the Ninja Five, submit to you as your captive.
Oh... the Ninja Five again. Where are the rest?
That, I do not know. It is unsophisticated to excessively concern oneself with others' actions.
Why don't we remain here and do something a little more tasteful, Lord? It is a magnificent night, after all.
She all of a sudden becomes completely relaxed. Her scattered silver hair mingles with the peach blossom petals strewn about.
The rope she almost used on me has found its way around its owner's wrists, tying them up not too tightly.
Mmh... The room seemed so narrow until a moment ago, but now, it seems to be just the right size.
Then again, this rope... No matter whose body it ends up on, it's always sure to make for some fun.
Heehee. You needn't be so vigilant, Lord. Come and sit beside me.
It would be my pleasure to keep you company... for the rest of the night.

The Fox Youkai's Meditative Training.say: Warm afternoon sunlight floods the training ground as cherry blossom petals float through the air.
Amidst this, I spot an unanticipated figure on a rooftop in the distance.
*sniff sniff*... A scent I don't recognize. Must be a visitor.
The figure on the roof is a girl lying on her back, swinging her furry tail around without a care in the world.
Even ignoring the will-o'-the-wisps floating around her, her appearance makes it easy to guess what she really is.
*yaaawn*... What a perfect place for a little afternoon nap.
Oops, I almost forgot something important! Are you also here to train?
"Also" here to train?
Yeah! Basking in the sun in a place brimming with spiritual energy is the most effective way to train.
She gives a contented stretch. There's no mistaking it – that's the look of someone enjoying an afternoon break.
Just so you know, this place is mine. It took a lot of work finding a training ground as comfy as this!
That said, I'm not an unreasonable youkai who refuses to hear people out.
It's not completely out of the question if you really, reeeally want to train here.
It so happens this little place is vacant.
With a lazy sweep of her tail, she brushes aside the fallen petals on the rooftop, clearing a small spot for me next to her.
Training by basking in the sun, huh? Sounds novel.
Doesn't it sound enticing? Come here and try it out with me!
I lie down next to the fox youkai, and we enjoy the sun together.
Now, relax and start to meditate. Take deep breaths...
Can you feel the spiritual energy along with the warmth?
More obvious than any spiritual energy is the feeling of her fluffy tail grazing my body.
Heehee... Can you feel your fatigue fading away as the spiritual energy fills you?
This is my very own secret method to assist in training.
Okay, now it's your turn to help me.
The soft tip of her tail tickles my hand. She blinks at me mischievously.
Alright. Then we'll be even.
I gently run my fingers through her big, fluffy tail, going with the grain of the fur.
Mmh... Hahh... Aahh!
Ahh... Hahh... This is good...
It feels like my body's filling with spiritual energy...
This is the best training I've done yet...
The comforting feeling makes the girl squint and curl up into a ball, and her tail unconsciously wraps around me.
*yawn*... I'm getting sleepy...
Resting is also a type of training, so why don't we sleep together?
And so, the fox youkai and I spend a relaxing afternoon together.

A Spectacular Ninjutsu Failure.say: The castle's bridge has been repaired, restoring the connection between the inner citadel and the outside world, and bringing back some of the place's former life.
As I stand atop the bridge and survey the water, I see the repairs being undertaken all across the castle.
From Suzutsuki hauling materials for repairs around, to Shimakaze running to and fro while relaying messages, to the ninja running across the river...
Wait, ninja running across the river?
Just need to break this pillar to make the bridge collapse again...
Come on, Morrison, you can do it...
Earth hiding ninj– I mean water hiding ni– Ugh! I mean whirlwind of water!
Not so fast!
Eek! I-I've been found!
L-let me just make this clear up front: I didn't come here to destroy the bridge!
It's to, um... make sure that the repairs went well.
That's right, I'm checking for mistakes made during the repairs!
Checking for mistakes? Care to tell me who you are?
Why, I'm... none other than the lord of the castle! Why else would I be here?
Then who am I?
H-how would I know?
I've got things I need to do, so if you'll excuse me...
Why are you running if you have no idea who I am?
Because I... Ugh, you leave me with no choice. Now that it's come to this, I have to use my ultimate skill!
Tr-transformation jutsu!
A plume of smoke rises – but nothing else happens.
What the... Wh-where's the illusion I set up?
Where's this phantom Taekaze was talking about? The one that's meant to draw everyone's attention away from me instantly?
Of all the times for my ninjutsu to fail...
If I were you, I'd surrender now.
I'm... Morrison, one of the Ninja Five.
I've failed in my mission... I surrender.
I'm sorry, but this is about all the ninjutsu I can manage! Please don't throw me to the wayside...
Let's... not get ahead of ourselves. I never said I'd take you in.
B-but I... I need a job...
Please, Lord Commander! Please!
I'll do anything as long as you let me work in your castle!

Moonlit Nocturne.say: The curtain of night falls, and a concert is about to wrap up.
According to Shimakaze, our new ally has already entered the castle premises, and it's the performer up on the stage.
Under the moonlight shall we meet, and I shall follow fate's guidance...
Bathed in the pure light of the solitary moon, Brennus wears a light purple Sakuran outfit. Her hair that flows down to her waist is adorned with an elaborate hairpin.
Upon noticing me, she halts her hands in the midst of putting away her instrument, then looks at me directly, and extends an invitation with her gaze.
Then, it's just me and her standing on the stage where her performance concluded.
Milord, I hope my performance was to your liking.
It was amazing.
Although... Somehow, I feel like you're not demonstrating your full ability.
If you were left wanting more, then kindly allow me to perform one more song.
For this song I crafted specifically with you in mind.
Her slender fingers gently pluck the strings, leisurely producing a romantic melody.
I feel drawn to the sound, as though I'm falling into a hazy illusory world woven by her song.
The lights and shadows of the stage dissolve, and by the time I realize it, she and I are standing in the middle of a boundless lake.
I've come here so that I may serve you, Milord.
Can you feel the yearning I have for you in this song?
Even if for just a moment, I wish to be with you...
As she leans closer to me, I pick up on a faint, familiar fragrance.
Her music still rings in my ears, expressing her hard-to-pin feelings. The shadows we cast under the moonlight overlap, eventually merging completely into one...
Don't stop, Milord...
From the moment our gazes first met, every instant in time we've shared has been etched into my heart...
The way the moon's light dimly illuminates your profile, your each and every little movement...
This meeting of ours here brings such fullness to my heart...
Should you be willing to accept it, I would offer you all the tenderness of my earthly life.
The final note ceases, and the silver moon and the lake both gently fade away.
The only thing that remains is the air between us – so dense that we can sense each other's heartbeats through it.
What was that illusion?
A secret to remain between us, Milord.
Be not unassured. My powers are for you alone.
Although a song must eventually end, feelings must not.
If you'd grant my wish, please take my hand.
Ah... How wondrously warm yours is.
The joy invoked in my heart in this moment feels like a dream, so beautiful I can hardly tell what is real and what is not...
Regardless, one who believes in fate ought to firmly seize this moment and respond.
I've waited so, so long for this wish, for this fluttering.
Please, join me in savoring this definite happiness in the present moment.

Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.say: Upon hearing the barracks had been repaired, I grabbed several jugs of fine alcohol and set out under the moonlight to join the celebration.
On my way there, however, the moonlit path suddenly became shrouded in an unusually thick mist.
This one is Alsace – the Sacramental Blade, the Unreachable Dream, the Arbitrator, and the Swordbearing Oni Protector of the Backwoods.
Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.actorName: Alsace [Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night]

Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.say: One has awaited you here.
Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.actorName: Alsace [Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night]

Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.say: A girl wearing a mask with oni horns balances herself on top of a rope.
Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.actorName: Alsace [Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night]

Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.say: That's a lot of titles... but there's only one of you.
Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.actorName: {playername}

Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.say: Of course. THIS one. Don't you think this one looks cool?
Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.actorName: Alsace [Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night]

Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.say: Hmph. The woods have been under one's protection long, long before your kind set foot here.
Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.actorName: Alsace [Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night]

Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.say: On the day that your castle was enveloped by that barrier, and its holy light obscured one's vision and sealed one's ears... one fell into a long slumber.
Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.actorName: Alsace [Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night]

Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.say: However, now that the barrier has fallen, and one has awoken, all that remains is to fulfill one's duty.
Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.actorName: Alsace [Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night]

Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.say: One's duty being: Testing the ruler of this land to determine if they have the resolve to protect it.
Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.actorName: Alsace [Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night]

Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.say: Now, then, lord awaiting judgment, are you ready?
Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.actorName: Alsace [Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night]

Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.say: I dunno, are YOU ready to judge me?
Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.actorName: {playername}

Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.say: ...Ready?
Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.actorName: Alsace [Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night]

Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.say: I mean, what form does your trial take? Do you have criteria in place? And once you make your judgment, how will you enforce it?
Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.actorName: {playername}

Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.say: Uh... The particulars are something one has yet to...
Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.actorName: Alsace [Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night]

Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.say: Oh, but you're Alsace – the Sacramental Blade, the Unreachable Dream, the Arbitrator, and the Swordbearing Oni Protector of the Backwoods. Surely you've figured out ALL the particulars?
Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.actorName: {playername}

Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.say: O-one is beginning to overheat...
Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.actorName: Alsace [Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night]

Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.say: No, wait! One has it!
Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.actorName: Alsace [Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night]

Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.say: Naturally, the trial will gauge your magnanimity and decisiveness, as well as determine how far you'll go to protect this land in– Hm?
Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.actorName: Alsace [Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night]

Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.say: Those jugs... Are they filled with alcohol?
Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.actorName: Alsace [Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night]

Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.say: These things? I just brought them with me on a whim.
Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.actorName: {playername}

Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.say: What a fragrant aroma... *gulp*... Is that not the same wine I cellared hundreds of years ago?
Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.actorName: Alsace [Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night]

Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.say: Come on, that's hard to believe.
Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.actorName: {playername}

Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.say: Indeed... Hard to believe how delectable it is.
Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.actorName: Alsace [Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night]

Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.say: *gulp*... *gulp*...
Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.actorName: Alsace [Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night]

Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.say: Without even waiting for my permission, she takes the wine in hand and starts drinking.
Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.actorName: Alsace [Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night]

Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.say: Bwuh... M-must carry out my duty before I get too drunk... Need to... deliver a verdict...
Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.actorName: Alsace [Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night]

Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.say: You have managed this castle... stupendously...
Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.actorName: Alsace [Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night]

Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.say: You did lose your barrier on account of a degree of carelessness, but even so...
Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.actorName: Alsace [Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night]

Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.say: At heart... you're a good person...
Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.actorName: Alsace [Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night]

Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.say: You... pass! I... This one deems you worthy!
Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.actorName: Alsace [Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night]

Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.say: O-okay, I'm... My body temperature is rapidly increasing...
Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.actorName: Alsace [Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night]

Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.say: Ugh... I can't bear it any longer...
Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.actorName: Alsace [Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night]

Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.say: Milord, come and help me release this heat...♡
Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night.actorName: Alsace [Tipsy Oni on a Sacred Night]

Dance of Crimson Strings.say: After the repairs on the armory were complete, we set up numerous traps in important places as a measure against enemy attacks.
To make sure I don't accidentally trigger them, I went to confirm their placements after they'd been set.
Then, just as I was about to leave, I suddenly heard the swish sound of a string being swiftly pulled in a certain room, followed by a startled yelp.
You there! You! Yes, the Good Samaritan!
Could you come here real quick and let me down?
The young ninja caught in the string trap dangles left and right, like a suspended pendulum.
Haha, come on, don't be so wary!
I'm not up to no good, promise! Would a baddie choose to make such a sublime entrance as I did?
Despite being hung upside down, the girl maintains an upbeat attitude.
Seriously, though, the traps in this place are out of this world.
Finding a sublime stage like this is precisely what I worked so hard to become a kunoichi for.
Ahaha – although I didn't get to display all the talents I've got...
If I just got another chance, I'd avoid these traps like they were nothing!
Hello? Why are you just staring without saying a word?
They say meetings like this are fate, you know. All you have to do is let me down, then we can do something much bigger and sublimer!
Wait, I think I recognize you... Didn't my mission directives have a picture of you...?
A-aren't you... the lord of the castle?!
Umm... Okay, forget everything I just said! Please? Pretty please forget it!
I'm just a dancer who's a little lost right now. I heard there was a magnificent castle in the area and I've come to show you my art!
I've not been up to anything bad, nope, not at all!
I haven't destroyed any barriers... or conducted any sabotage... Nothing like that...
Are you one of the Ninja Five?
Whuah?! You figured it out THAT fast?
Okay, okay, I fess up to it! I'm I-404, the sublimest kunoichi in the world, and I surrender. There, I said it!
Before I decide whether to accept your surrender or not, I've got a question. What "something much bigger and sublimer" were you talking about a minute ago?
I-I mean, that's a bit broad, isn't it?!
I guess, for example... setting off the most dazzling fireworks display ever? Or sneaking in under the guards' noses and snatching their precious lord away...
Wait, I've basically half-succeeded at the latter.
Her lips curve into a sly smile, and she starts rocking her body in a light rhythm different from just a moment ago.
That's right! It's just you and me right now!
So, since the stage is set, why don't we dance, hm?
I guarantee you'll have all the fun you want!

Lady Laffey's Languid Tour.say: While I'm busy dealing with our little youkai infestation, I receive good news from Shimakaze.
The lady of the neighboring Castle of the Bunnies has answered our call and asked to meet me in the forest between our castles. This could be a huge boon.
I arrive at the meeting point early. The scent of pine drifts through the forest.
After a while, I encounter her in a very surprising way.
Zzzz... Zzzz...
When I notice this forest path is unusually rabbit-filled, the herd suddenly stops in front of me.
Upon the back of the lead bunny sleeps a small girl.
*yawn*... Are we there already?
The honorable Lady Laffey of the Castle of the Bunnies has heard your plea for aid...
Don't worry... Laffey will help you take care of those pesky youkai...
But... Hmm...
Lord Commander, you look tired.
You're gonna need a nap first...
The Castle of the Bunnies has lots of pillows... All kinds of bedding, really...
Wanna come back with Laffey first?
And just let youkai and random ninjas wreak havoc in my own?
Mmm... Yeah, that would suck. Okay, we'll come to your castle.
But we still need that nap...
Lord Commander, hop on the bunny.
She raises her arms to stretch. Then, she helps me climb onto this comically oversized rabbit.
Mm... That's better. Bunny guard, maaarch!
Laffey's going to sleep... Lord Commander, nap with me.
Nap, and forget all your worries...
Her soft breaths tickle my cheek, accompanied by a sweet scent.
Zzzz...
Zzzz...
The cloud-like softness of the bunny's back sends us both to the land of dreams together.

Traveling Mood Mechanism.say: Shimakaze's call for aid did not fall on deaf ears.
Gascogne, heiress to a noble family renowned for their efficiency, led a massive supply convoy to our castle.
She invited me on a stroll to hand over and discuss the supply list, but I can't help but think she has something else in mind.
Shipment confirmed to include emergency repair materials, goods for sustaining life, and assorted building materials.
Transport route optimization... Complete. This will ensure greater efficiency in future supply efforts.
Master, I've finished tallying the supplies. Please confirm.
I see the list here says 3,000 iron arrowheads, but we received 7,000?
The excess was my treat.
Further support is on the way, as well.
As long as I'm here, you don't need to worry.
After finishing the inventory, it's clear that things are looking up within the castle.
The courtyard looks even more beautiful with such a weight lifted off my shoulders.
A cool breeze blows, and maple leaves flutter down to the pond. Each one sends little ripples throughout the water.
But Master, the purpose of my trip was not only to personally deliver these supplies.
As she pauses, her calm gaze seems to pierce through my eyes and into my soul.
Based on analysis of past events, you require not just supplies and a morale boost...
...But also emotional support and companionship.
Information about you exists in many places.
I just have a special interest in your feelings and desires.
I've been monitoring you closely for some time now.
If you have any requests, don't hesitate to ask. I'll personally see them fulfilled.
Physical supplies are merely a visible and portable medium.
They're consumed, and they're replaced.
However, the emotional intent and resulting desires behind their delivery and consumption are constant.
I've pondered the exact nature of these desires for countless hours.
In the end, my conclusion was simple.
The answer is companionship. Not something temporary, but something to be maintained over the long term.
Gascogne's words are simple and blunt.
She slowly approaches and stops next to me.
I will be at your side at all times, Master, wherever you may need me.
Whether you order me to or not, I'll protect you and support you forever.
Wherever you go, I ask that you take me with you.
Thank you. Your support means the world to me.
Feedback confirmed.
Is this emotion that I'm experiencing... joy?
It's very unique, but...
I've confirmed that I'm in excellent condition.
I want to know more about this feeling.
Requesting input of your own joy, Master.

Stringed Interrogation.say: After the restoration of the castle's main tower, my office is finally open again.
As I prepare for my own intense battle with a mountain of paperwork, a shadow stalks through my periphery.
I follow the silhouette with my eyes and espy a woman in a tight black outfit. Her silver hair gleams in the moonlight.
She seems to be drawing a map of the castle.
Hmm. Some of these building positions and styles need to be revised.
But I'm out of time.
Your timing couldn't have been worse.
She tucks her map away and leaps gracefully into the night sky.
Instantly after, the chilly night wind cuts into me. Her icy eyes pierce through me like knives.
But I'm glad to see that my intel was correct. You're usually so well-guarded, yet now you're all by yourself.
I don't want the other girls to be stuck working overtime with me.
How convenient for me.
We have all the time in the world. Why don't you try guessing my plans?
Will I flee with an unfinished map in hand? Or will I take a greater prize with me?
Heehee, I think I'm leaning toward the latter.
Not a bad plan, sure, but you know what they say about the best-laid plans.
...You set up an ambush?
Despite her surprised tone, the skilled ninja promptly leaps back out of reach.
She surveys the empty balcony behind me, and then the quiet courtyard below.
Then, her eyes turn back to me, as if she's trying to ascertain the truth of my claim.
In that case, I'd best not keep you for too long.
I will take my leave now.
She dances over the vermilion railing and darts toward a nearby rooftop.
I feign pursuit, using the opportunity to adjust my positioning.
As expected, the fake chase doesn't last long. She quickly stops, and I can see her expression change in the distance.
Well. So much for that.
There isn't a rooftop archer or soldier waiting in ambush to be seen anywhere.
You're the only person here.
You were bluffing! What a bold lord you are... Heehee.
Soyuz strokes the kunai tied to her thigh.
She isn't the cautious prey anymore – she has become the hunter, eyes set on her target.
What say we change the rules of this little game?
I'll give you a few minutes to start running. How does that sound?
Actually... No. This has already been more than enough fun.
It's my turn to chase you now.
Her curves stand out more in the moonlight, and her long silver hair ripples in the breeze.
As I'm cornered in my dark room, the pursuit finally comes to an end.
But just before I can be caught, I press an inconspicuous button on the wall.
After a soft click, a web of thread shoots forth, spreading out to ensnare her.
Shock runs through her eyes, and she reflexively moves to evade.
However, her attempt at evasion only takes her into the path of danger.
Ngh... That thread of yours tore my clothes.
So this trap only tears clothing, hindering your prey's movement without injuring them.
Is that your twisted brand of mercy? Or did you contrive all of these events just to see this sight?
Either way, I'm forced to admit defeat.
Soyuz is stuck in a position where her legs are both bent and her head is nearly touching the floor. Her ninja outfit is ripped in several places.
Her silver hair is splayed across the floor, twitching with every labored breath.
However, even in this desperate predicament, she is unshaken.
You brought my guard down with that bluff...
...All as a means of drawing me into your trap.
Even if it wasn't planned out from the start, your ability to adapt and outsmart your enemies has impressed me.
So...
Have you decided what you're going to do with me?
If your mind isn't made up yet, then allow me to make a proposal.
For example... I, one of the Ninja Five, may serve you in secret.
You and I could manage this fantastical castle in its fantastical wonderland together – you in the limelight, and I in the shadows.
No objections, I see... Heehee, I thought that was an attractive proposal.
I trust that you'll make good use of my abilities.
But before we leave...
Can you help me find a... proper set of clothes? Preferably intact.

A Visitor in the Dead of Night.say: Castle reconstruction efforts finally reach the castle court – what used to be my residence.
I'm exhausted to the bone from consecutive days of overwork. Finally, I can sleep.
After taking a bath, I lean over to blow out the candle. But then, I hear a loud crack from the direction of the window.
Aaahhhh! Owch...
I stepped on a trap... Guess I should've expected that, in hindsight.
Why'd someone set up a trap here of all places, though? They never think of just gazing out the window and enjoying the view?
The dim moonlight illuminates the source of all the noise.
A girl in a ninja outfit is stuck in the broken window frame. The trap set there makes it impossible for her to right herself.
She's using her hands to maintain balance, but her long hair droops messily to the floor.
"Infiltrating is one thing. Making it look like a dance... that comes naturally to me☆"
See? I had a cool line ready and everything!
But who the heck sets a trip wire in their window, of all places?!
I planned for everything. Window, door, roof, you name it.
Frankly, you ninjas are kind of predictable.
Hah! Don't get so full of yourself just yet!
To a member of the Ninja Five, a trap like this is... e-easy... easy stuff!
She visibly exerts herself, trying to prop herself up with her arms to slip out of this predicament.
But no matter how she wriggles and writhes, she remains stuck in the window. Losing balance only makes her slide down more, getting her more stuck in the process.
*pant*... *pant*... I can't do it.
My clothes got caught, too... My poor custom-made outfit is ruined! Gaaah!
What are you looking at... Huh? My chest...? Ack! N-no looking!
I'm no pro ninja or anything, but I can't tolerate such a blunder! Let's try this again, just one more...
Nope. Not happening. Hehe, time to give up!
I guess I can't get out alone. In this case...
Oh, Milord, won't you PLEASE help me out of this little pickle?
Um. Do you surrender, then, or what?
That's right! My feet are getting kinda numb here...
The beautiful Guam officially surrenders! Okay, now help me, please!
I walk over to the window and stoop down to undo the trap. Suddenly, she grabs my wrist... and then leans over and clings to me.
You underestimate me!
I gotta make up for that embarrassing entrance somehow!
Hehehe, what do you think I'm gonna do?
Relax. I said I surrender, remember?
Oh... You smell like you just got out of the bath. So that's why you're barely dressed!
My sudden intrusion must have interrupted your alone time, huh...
As an apology... let me help you get dressed properly!
Don't you worry your pretty little head! No matter how demanding the mission, Kunoichi Guam always gets it done...
Now, get ready to accept my SUPER sincere surrender!

Floral Ninja Roleplay.say: My lord, your tea is cold. Allow me to get you a new one.
You busy yourself with so much paperwork every day that you could use a nice aroma to refresh your mind. Keep me by your side, and I'll gladly serve you...
My lord? My lord... My lord! You won't get rid of me that easily this time!
As for where this clingy ninja came from, well, it all started after the restoration of the tea house.
In this scenario, I had a secret tea house built in the castle tower to store my treasures safely.
However, after the repairs, I was ambushed by Hakuhou when I went to check on said treasures.
I managed to subdue her, leading to... this.
I must tell you, my lord...
Before I met you, what I sought were your exquisite silks and beautiful gems...
But now, they pale in comparison to your pure radiance.
I don't want these cold, lifeless objects anymore. No, I want to be your newest treasure.
Hold me, my lord, with your gentle yet firm hands.
...My lord? Are you listening?
Why do you refuse to let me be yours? Is it because I was one of the Ninja Five?
Her eyes redden slightly, as if she's about to cry.
...If I'm not mistaken, I already signed the order for your release.
You MUST be mistaken.
I'm an awful, awful woman who committed an awful crime. I took advantage of the youkai problem to sneak into your castle and attack you...
I've been destined to be your prisoner ever since the moment I pointed my blade at you.
It's my fate to serve you wholeheartedly forevermore.
Also... that order you mentioned? Hmm... Oh! I remember it now.
She cocks her head in thought for a moment and then flashes a sweet smile.
When I burned that piece of paper, I meant to call for you to show you. But I forgot.
Really, I couldn't believe that my lord would issue such a cruel order.
If you really want to send me away that badly, then I will obey. But...
As Hakuhou casts her eyes downward, a cold gleam is reflected in them. It's the gleam of the unsheathed sword by her side.
Her slender fingertips trace the blade's tip, which quickly becomes dyed red.
Upon seeing this, her lips stretch into a satisfied grin.
Goodness, that hurts...

options.content: (Make her put the sword away first.)

Floral Ninja Roleplay.say: Look, my lord. I seem to have hurt myself – how careless of me. Won't you please help make it better?
Why, I've gotten dizzy... I'm not sure I can sit up straight.
Don't push me away, my lord... Just let me lean on you for a while.
You don't want to see me get hurt again?
If that's how you feel, then you must be my rock, my dear lord.
Please, keep me with you. Closer to you than anyone else...
I'll be your most precious treasure of all.
More beautiful and radiant than any gem, and all yours... Your own Hakuhou.

sequence: 不思議の桃源郷に、雄大なる不思議の城あり。
不思議の城には不思議の城主たる指揮官あり、不思議なお宝を守護したり。
そのお宝は夜闇の灯台の如く、世の全ての貪欲と渇望を引き寄せ、誰もが手にせんと望む。
されどお宝は不思議な守りの術式に守られ、城主指揮官以外、何人たりとも近づくこと能わず。
お宝を狙う悪しき者、皆手を組むことを決意せり。
邪なる儀式を行い、繁栄を極めし地、大いに乱れ廃墟と化せり。
雄大なる城も、守りの術式も崩れ落つ。
術式なき今、宝を我が物にせんと、雪崩の如く敵が狙い来たれり。
宝ありしこの地は、じきに戦場と化さん。
――幸いなことに、まだ時間があるようだ

序ノ章.say: 城主指揮官さん、緊急事態につきご無礼をお許しください！
守りの結界が壊れ、宝物の間を狙う忍者たちにお城に潜入されました！
そ、それと！結界に封じられていた妖鬼たちが出てきてしまいました……
城内の4つの区域…三ノ丸、二ノ丸、東曲輪、本丸に大きな被害が出てるから、大至急修理が必要だよ！
外との通信も絶たれ、島風たちは孤立状態に陥ってしまったようです！
――なるほど……状況は大体わかった
――シナリオの名前が「忍びの城」って名前なのに、なんで「忍者に攻められた城」になってるんだ…？
んんっ！細かいことは気にしないでくださいませ！

options.content: まずはお宝の守りを固める
まずはシナリオの名前を変えてくれ

序ノ章.say: と、とにかく主命をください！花月たちはいかがすれば？
はい！城を修理し、お宝を守ります！
はい！城を修理し、お宝を守ります！
はっ…違いますよ！城を修理し、お宝を守るべきです！
三ノ丸から修理することをおすすめします！
――……どうして一番奥の本丸から修理しないの？
シナリオの進行が乱れてしまいますから……
――……そうか。じゃあ花月、修理作業の指揮を頼むよ
はい、城主指揮官さん！
涼月は各所の防御施設と詰所の修理をお願いします。城の状態を立て直して敵のさらなる侵入を防ぎましょう
了解！プー太といっしょに頑張るよ！
春月は結界の張り直しをお願いします。封印を解かれた妖鬼たちをもう一度縛り付けなければなりません
は、春月、拝命しました！
それと…島風は機が熟したら盟友たちに支援要請をお願いします
島風、全速前進の準備はできておりますぞ！
城主指揮官さん、指示はこれで全部です。引き続き情報を収集し、修理の進捗を定期的にお知らせいたしますっ！
――よし、演目を始めるとしよう

三ノ丸修理完了.say: 城主指揮官さん、三ノ丸の修理が完了しました。現状を報告させていただきますね
涼月の統括で、長屋、米蔵、水堀の修理が完了しました
食料と水の問題はだいぶ解決しまして、ようやく安全な場所で眠れるようになりました
春月のほうも結界を張り直す方法を見つけたそうなので、遠からず進展があると思います
法陣で三ノ丸の妖鬼も無事鎮めましたし、城内の人心は落ち着きつつあります
また、召集に応じた浪人の武芸者――ウォースパイトさんですが……
彼女の指揮で番所を増設し、治安と秩序の回復に勤しんでいます
そろそろ人手を次の修理に回しても大丈夫かと
はい！二ノ丸はかなり広い範囲で被害を受けています
屋敷には様々な公務の書類が保存されていますから、敵の忍者に狙われる可能性も…
――じゃあ、すぐ二ノ丸の修理を始めよう
はい、主命を伝えてきます！

二ノ丸修理完了.say: 三ノ丸に続いて、二ノ丸の修復も完了しました。…花月はまだ未熟者ですけど、指揮官さんのお役に立てたのではないでしょうか
詳細について報告させてください！
まずは守りの結界の張り直しについて――春月による作業案が固まりました。資材の調達が整い次第すぐにでも始められます
ただ、妖鬼たちの対処は並行して行えません……頼れる助っ人が必要です……
それと、もう一ついい知らせがあります！
かの有名な奏者――ブレンヌスさんが招聘の呼びかけに応じて来てくれました
おかげで城内の士気がぐんと高まり、初回の演奏会からすでに満席です
次は涼月が担当する施設の修理ですけど――副天守と修行地、三の御門の修理が完了しました
指揮官さんが捕縛した忍者たちからも多くの情報がもたらされています
彼女たちが所属していたかの悪名高き盗賊組織――「忍者五人衆」が……これからの復旧作業でも色々邪魔してくるかもしれません
時間が長引けば、それだけ不測の事態が起こりかねません。まずは東曲輪の兵舎を復旧させ、城内の常備兵力の強化を行いましょう
そうすればいざという時に打って出られるので、主導権を握ることができます
